programme.title: Iconic Australia - The Rebels
programme.desc: When you look back through Australia's history, social progress is almost always marked by the rebellious behaviour of larrikin Aussies who, through their charisma, authenticity and passionate determination created change.

programme.title: Paradise Kitchen Bali - Episode 10
programme.desc: Indulge in Lauren's exploration of the chocolate world as she uncovers its unique characteristics. From savory chocolate salsa to raw vegan cake, her mix of recipes leaves a lasting appreciation for this beloved ingredient.

programme.title: The Streets with Dan Hong - Episode 2
programme.desc: Dan Hong sets out to unearth iconic national street food dishes, tracing them back to their roots and then preparing them himself.

programme.title: Landline - Episode 40

programme.title: Offsiders - Episode 41

programme.title: That Pacific Sports Show - End Of Year Special
programme.desc: It's the season finale of That Pacific Sports Show! Tiana Penitani Gray, Sam Wykes, Sera Naiqama and Tinirau Arona wrap up 2025 with highlights, special guests, and powerful Pasifika performances. (Final for 2025)

programme.desc: Episode 2 - 6 more disguised celebrities take to the stage, Pearly King, Onomatopoeia, Pig, Sea Slug, Cactus, and Tomato Sauce. Panellists Jonathan Ross, Davina McCall, Peter Crouch and Oti Mabuse try to work out who is behind the mask.

programme.title: Alone (S10) - By Any Means
programme.desc: By Any Means - The three remaining survivalists brace themselves for the fight to the finish. One participant finds it impossible to stay warm, while others risk it all on the ice. Only one can claim the $500,000 prize.

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman (S2) - Vietnam POW Escape
programme.desc: Vietnam POW Escape - A German-American pilot, Dieter Dengler, uses survival skills honed as a child to escape a secret prison in Laos in the early years of the Vietnam war.

programme.title: The Making Of: Crossroads, Maldives - Open Doors
programme.desc: Open Doors - With so much hard work required to get to this point, can the team carry out the incredible task of delivering peak service right from the word GO.

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler (S1) - Treacherous Travel
programme.desc: Treacherous Travel - From exploding cars and blimp disasters to kids sent through the mail and doomed personal helicopters, the past is packed with jaw-dropping travel tales that paved the road to modern transportation.

programme.title: The Making Of: Crossroads, Maldives - Final Preparations
programme.desc: Final Preparations - The final countdown to opening has begun, but there’s still a host of jobs left to complete. This episode follows the work needed to deliver the small details that take a resort from good to great.

programme.title: The Making Of: Crossroads, Maldives - Open Doors
programme.desc: Open Doors - With so much hard work required to get to this point, can the team carry out the incredible task of delivering peak service right from the word GO.

programme.title: Alone (S10) - By Any Means
programme.desc: By Any Means - The three remaining survivalists brace themselves for the fight to the finish. One participant finds it impossible to stay warm, while others risk it all on the ice. Only one can claim the $500,000 prize.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S5) - Soda Rising: Birth Of Pop
programme.desc: Soda Rising: Birth Of Pop - In the late 1800s, two pharmacists 1500 miles apart race to create healthy, non-alcoholic beverage options, kickstarting the entire soda industry with their breakout hits: Hires Root Beer and Dr. Pepper.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3) - Devastating Disasters
programme.desc: Devastating Disasters - In our modern world, we tend to think that technology and scientific knowledge can help protect us from almost anything, including natural disasters. But is that really true?

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S1) - Strange Experiments
programme.desc: Strange Experiments - Monkey glands for immortality, hypnotised assassins, and a brain-linked cyborg couple. We investigate some of the strangest experiments on record. From two-headed dogs to testicle transplants...

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman (S2) - Vietnam POW Escape

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S1) - Astonishing Bodies
programme.desc: Astonishing Bodies - From a headless chicken that lives over one year to an out-of-this-world "celestial body" where it rains molten glass, we explore the most astonishing bodies through these truly unbelievable stories.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3) - Mysteries Of The Missing Link
programme.desc: Mysteries Of The Missing Link - Today, human civilisation spans the globe, and there are more than 7 billion people on Earth. But how did humanity evolve? Were there other kinds of human-like creatures?

programme.title: Forged In Fire (S9) - Supersized: Hog Wild
programme.desc: Supersized: Hog Wild - In the last of a four-episode event we're calling SUPERSIZED, four smiths face a colossal challenge when they must forge giant hog splitters from 12 pounds of steel.

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built The World (S2) - Internet Killed The Video Store
programme.desc: Internet Killed The Video Store - A software engineer is inspired to create a bigger, unprecedented family-friendly video store, Blockbuster. But as the dot-com boom explodes, an opening appears for two executives to redefine the industry.

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built The World (S2) - End Of The Landlines
programme.desc: End Of The Landlines - When Motorola introduces the first handheld portable telephone to the world, the futuristic technology sets off a fierce battle among telecommunications companies to produce the most popular cell phone.

programme.title: The Pickers (S17) - Best Of: Picks Of The Sea
programme.desc: Best Of: Picks Of The Sea - Mike and Frank dive into a treasure hunt of picks from the sea. Dani goes after a gem from the Amazon and Robbie haggles for nautical gold with the captain of a tugboat.

programme.title: Alone (S11) - Symphony Of Solitude
programme.desc: Symphony Of Solitude - As the river finally begins to freeze, the remaining survivalists struggle with the loss of daylight. One participant's snare line gets stalked by a predator; another devises a plan to defeat an enemy.

programme.title: The Pickers (S18) - Pumps, Prints And Picks
programme.desc: Pumps, Prints And Picks - Joined by his long-time picking buddy Jersey Jon, Mike goes hog wild at a century-old Connecticut print shop while Robbie and Danielle unearth a rare globe at a 1920s truck stop.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S15) - The Giants Of Malta
programme.desc: The Giants Of Malta - Enormous, megalithic structures of mysterious origins. Could the ancient mysteries that exist on the Mediterranean islands of Malta be connected to local legends of alien visitation and hybrid beings?

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S11) - Tea Time
programme.desc: Tea Time - While Gary and Rick uncover unprecedented finds in the swamp, the team finally reaches depth in the Garden Shaft, and their probe drilling operation delivers thrilling results immediately.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S11) - Rick And Mortar
programme.desc: Rick And Mortar - With the help of science, the Fellowship uncovers an irrefutable connection between the Money Pit and Lot 5.

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler (S1) - Food Fiascos
programme.desc: Food Fiascos - Snack on a feast of food horrors from the past: from radioactive energy drinks to scandalous snacks made with Olestra, we uncover the incredible things people once ate without a second thought.

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman (S2) - Alton City Escape
programme.desc: Alton City Escape - Quawntay Adams gets caught up in a big marijuana bust and is sentenced to a long prison term. When he finds out he is going to be a father, he determines to break out of his maximum-security cell.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3) - Holy Relics
programme.desc: Holy Relics - There have been many sacred relics believed to be imbued with mystical powers. Is it possible that these ordinary items, like a tooth, or a soldier's spear, can have the ability to perform miracles?

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2) - Into The Magnetic Storm
programme.desc: Into The Magnetic Storm - The team seeks out the wreck of the Revonoc, a racing yacht that vanished in 1958 with a crew of five. A freak magnetic anomaly was detected in the Triangle when she went missing.

programme.title: Beyond Skinwalker Ranch (S1) - Rocky Mountain Ranch
programme.desc: Rocky Mountain Ranch - Investigator Katie Paige first encountered terrifying High Strangeness as a 9-year-old; now, Andy and Paul are bringing her back after 50 years to see if they can capture scientific evidence.

programme.title: Swamp People (S14) - Who Will Be King?
programme.desc: Who Will Be King? - It's the final day of gator season, and teams are all within striking distance of winning the competition for 350 new tags. Ronnie and Ashley fight to hang onto their lead.

programme.title: American Godfathers: The Five Families - Rise Of The New Dons
programme.desc: Rise Of The New Dons - Rise of The New Dons focuses on the deadly conflict between the Families' old guard and a new generation of younger, American-born mobsters willing to defy the authority of the bosses.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S11) - Digging Back In
programme.desc: Digging Back In - While the team continues to chase the elusive tunnel in the Money Pit, evidence that the swamp was used for an off-loading operation abounds, and new clues on Lot 5 point to Captain Phipps.

programme.title: Forged In Fire (S9) - Friend Or Foe
programme.desc: Friend Or Foe - Two friends and two brothers enter the forge as teams to compete. But after working as teams to recreate a Scottish Broadsword, the victorious team will be divided and forced to face each other.

programme.title: The Secret Of Skinwalker Ranch (S5) - Bad To The Drone
programme.desc: Bad To The Drone - When the team launches an illuminated swarm of drones on Skinwalker Ranch, they are stunned by a series of mysterious events.

programme.title: Beyond Skinwalker Ranch (S1) - Rocky Mountain Ranch
programme.desc: Rocky Mountain Ranch - Investigator Katie Paige first encountered terrifying High Strangeness as a 9-year-old; now, Andy and Paul are bringing her back after 50 years to see if they can capture scientific evidence.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3) - Curses Unleashed
programme.desc: Curses Unleashed - Throughout history, every major civilisation has believed in curses and their power to inflict harm. But if curses are real, then what brings them into existence? And how are they triggered?

programme.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion (S3) - Snakin' Ain't Easy
programme.desc: Snakin' Ain't Easy - Troy and Pickle help rid a citrus grove of pythons. Bill is forced to hunt solo for the day. Meanwhile, Brue and Zak mount an airboat to a new honey hole, and Dusty responds to a friend's call for help.

programme.title: Swamp People (S14) - Who Will Be King?
programme.desc: Who Will Be King? - It's the final day of gator season, and teams are all within striking distance of winning the competition for 350 new tags. Ronnie and Ashley fight to hang onto their lead.

programme.title: American Godfathers: The Five Families - Rise Of The New Dons
programme.desc: Rise Of The New Dons - Rise of The New Dons focuses on the deadly conflict between the Families' old guard and a new generation of younger, American-born mobsters willing to defy the authority of the bosses.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3) - Mysterious Monsters
programme.desc: Mysterious Monsters - Throughout the world, there have been many sightings of bizarre creatures that cannot be explained by science. Is it possible that there are terrifying monsters, lurking in the shadows of planet Earth?

programme.title: How Disney Built America - The Birth Of Mickey
programme.desc: The Birth Of Mickey - A cartoon studio creates one of the most recognisable characters in the world. Mickey Mouse begins as a pencil sketch, and through a journey of failure, innovation, and guts becomes an American icon.

programme.title: How Disney Built America - Dawn Of The Animated Blockbuster
programme.desc: Dawn Of The Animated Blockbuster - Facing soaring costs, mounting criticism, and a tight deadline, Walt Disney pushes the limits of technology to create the first full-length animated feature film.

programme.title: Alone (S12) - Weak Spot
programme.desc: Weak Spot - The remaining three survivalists continue to push their limits as they reach nearly a month in the Great Karoo Desert. One participant loses the use of a major tool and all their hope along with it.

programme.title: Ikemefuna
programme.desc: The joy of motherhood is stripped from her; but hell hath no fury.

programme.desc: Episode 209 - Start your day off right (informed and smiling) as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish - Department of Magical Violations / Teacher's Pal
programme.desc: Department of Magical Violations / Teacher's Pal - Hazel, Cosmo, and Wanda must pass Wish Trials or Jorgen will assign Hazel to a new fairy who's more efficient, but less fun. // Nervous about not fitting in with the other kids at school, Hazel wishes to be friends with the teachers instead.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Patnocchio / ChefBob
programme.desc: Patnocchio / ChefBob - Plankton tells Patrick he's his conscience so he can convince the wooden-headed star to steal him a Krabby Patty. // When Mr. Krabs puts in an open kitchen, SpongeBob gets stage fright and has to invent a new persona.

programme.title: The Casagrandes - The Kid Plays in the Picture / Achy Breaky Art
programme.desc: The Kid Plays in the Picture / Achy Breaky Art - Carl's love for toys gets him caught up in a whirlwind toy review career. // Frida's art gets a bad review, the kids try to stage a new auction to lift her spirits.

programme.title: Wylde Pak - Woori World / Finding FlamingoFan85
programme.desc: Woori World / Finding FlamingoFan85 - The family prepares for war, AKA a trip to the local Asian market. After their battle to procure a rare cookie, Jack feels more part of the family. // The Groom & Board gets a bad review. Lily tries to find the culprit and "correct the record.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish - Fly Pt. 1 / Fly Pt. 2
programme.desc: Fly Pt. 1 / Fly Pt. 2 - When Hazel has trouble adjusting to her move to Dimmadelphia, she discovers her neighbors, Cosmo and Wanda, are fairies!

programme.title: Danger Force - Guardians of the Ponytail
programme.desc: Guardians of the Ponytail - Danger Force is hired by Rivalton's Duke Wellington to protect him and his ponytail from his jealous uncle, Archduke Fernando. They at first think it's easy money, until they find out The Archduke hired Ray and Henry Hart to capture Duke Wellington.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover - She's All Splat
programme.desc: She's All Splat - With Cherry working at Splat by Sea, Max ropes her into a fake dating scheme to score partner discounts at the restaurant. Chloe faces a tough choice between winning a trivia competition or supporting her brother Billy when he wants to join her team.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover - Party All The Crime
programme.desc: Party All The Crime - After Chloe's birthday party is cancelled, Max and Phoebe compete to throw her a new one. When Max's time-stopping birthday gift falls into the wrong hands, he must work with Phoebe to stop some party poopers from ruining Chloe's birthday.

programme.title: The Casagrandes - Fool's Gold / Flight Plan
programme.desc: Fool's Gold / Flight Plan - When they find a treasure map, the Casagrandes go on a wild search for Pancho Villa's gold. // Frida and Carlos go on a fancy plane ride, but Carl and CJ try to sneak on for an adventure of their own.

programme.title: The Casagrandes - Operation Popstar
programme.desc: Operation Popstar - Ronnie Anne and Sid try to get Yoon Kwan's autograph and Carlota helps Alisa prepare for the Great Lakes City Music Festival!

programme.title: The Casagrandes - Ay Fidelity / Cut the Chisme
programme.desc: Ay Fidelity / Cut the Chisme - When Bobby and Par are left in charge of Ziggy's shop, they must resist jamming with the shop's musical treasures. // The family tries to stop their notorious chismoso Hector from gossiping all over town but can he stay quiet?

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles - Raph Thinks It Through
programme.desc: Raph Thinks It Through - Raph's strength won't save him when he's caught between the Mechazoids and the notorious street gang known as Purple Dragons! Raph's going to have to use his head to get out of this one!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Life Insurance / Burst Your Bubble
programme.desc: Life Insurance / Burst Your Bubble - After a misunderstanding, SpongeBob and Patrick try to prove their life insurance protects them from any danger! // When SpongeBob blows himself a bubble boat, everyone in town wants one! Everyone except Mrs. Puff, that is.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Plankton Retires / Trident Trouble
programme.desc: Plankton Retires / Trident Trouble - Plankton closes the Chum Bucket and moves to a new town, but Mr. Krabs suspects he's still up to no good. // When SpongeBob accidentally picks up Neptune's magic trident, there's no telling what trouble he may cause!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - The Incredible Shrinking Sponge / Sportz?
programme.desc: The Incredible Shrinking Sponge / Sportz? - SpongeBob must figure out how to do his job after accidentally shrinking himself. // Squidward invents a new sport to get back at SpongeBob and Patrick for annoying him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - The Getaway / Lost and Found
programme.desc: The Getaway / Lost and Found - When SpongeBob mistakes an escaped convict for his driving instructor, it's the new teacher who learns a lesson. // When Krabs sends him searching for a missing toy, SpongeBob finds himself lost... in the lost & found!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Patrick's Coupon / Out of the Picture
programme.desc: Patrick's Coupon / Out of the Picture - Patrick has a coupon for free ice cream, but he'll have to get to the store if he wants to use it! // Krabs buys Squidward's art, but to make a profit on his purchase he'll have to get the artist out of the picture!

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles - The Pearl
programme.desc: The Pearl - The East River 3 are on the verge of victory! The Turtles and Mutanimals must team up to stop them, but not everything is as it seems... what is the PEARL and why does Goldfin want it?

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles - Leonardo Stands Alone
programme.desc: Leonardo Stands Alone - The Ninja Turtles are on the run and...alone. Leonardo is a leader but who is he without anyone to lead? Leo now has to stop Bishop and her Mechazoids while trying to save his brothers.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish - Prime Meridian Love / Stanky Danky
programme.desc: Prime Meridian Love / Stanky Danky - Hazel wishes the main character from her favorite graphic novel into the real world. // Hazel befriends a sentient dumpster named Danky after learning about humans' harmful effects on the environment.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish - Murder She Wished
programme.desc: Murder She Wished - When Hazel's landlord goes missing, she makes a wish to get to the bottom of the case!

programme.title: The Smurfs - Funny Mommy / Smurfy Day Care
programme.desc: Funny Mommy / Smurfy Day Care - Jokey transforms Poet into Gargamel's Mom, but they find themselves trapped in Gargamel's hovel. // Storm has to become a super smurfsitter when all of the Smurfs turn back into babies.

programme.title: The Smurfs - Smurfy Secrets
programme.desc: Smurfy Secrets - When Gargamel tries to transform into a Smurf, the Smurfs have to share their secrets to prove their identity.

programme.title: The Smurfs - Crashing Gargamel's Party / The Curse of the Smurfs' Treasure
programme.desc: Crashing Gargamel's Party / The Curse of the Smurfs' Treasure - When Gargamel convinces Dimwitty and Begonia that he is nice, they invite him to the village for a party. // Farmer and Vanity unearth a chest which contains a magnificent gem that brings bad luck to anyone who touches it!

programme.title: The Casagrandes - Strife Coach / Gossip Girl
programme.desc: Strife Coach / Gossip Girl - Ronnie Anne and her friends help get Mrs. Kernicky hired as the new PE coach, but her classes are no joke! // When a Sid secret is leaked at school, Ronnie Anne and Sid wonder if they can continue being best buds!

programme.title: The Casagrandes - Bend It Like Abuelo / Bunstoppable
programme.desc: Bend It Like Abuelo / Bunstoppable - Hector finally joins his dream soccer team as their good luck charm, but what happens when his luck runs out? // While preparing bao for the Chinese Cultural Fair, Sid and Adelaide face off against time-hopping bandits!

programme.title: The Casagrandes - Squawk in the Name of Love / Date with Destiny
programme.desc: Squawk in the Name of Love / Date with Destiny - Sergio enlists Adelaide's help to become a gentleman in order to win Priscilla back! // Rosa hears an Ernesto Estrella prediction that Maria and Arturo could get back together - could it be true?

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show - Chum Bucket List / Big Baby Patrick
programme.desc: Chum Bucket List / Big Baby Patrick - After Patrick eats life-threatening chum, SpongeBob helps him check off his bucket list. // Patrick devolves back into a baby so he can keep his childhood toys.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - A Cabin in the Kelp / The Hankering
programme.desc: A Cabin in the Kelp / The Hankering - The Gal Pals take Pearl to a cabin in the woods for a weekend of silly pranks. // Mr. Krabs has a secret taste for something surprising.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Who R Zoo? / The Kwarantined Krab
programme.desc: Who R Zoo? / The Kwarantined Krab - SpongeBob and Patrick create their own zoo made entirely of bubbles! // The Krusty Krab goes under emergency quarantine, but no one knows who carries the mysterious illness.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Plankton's Intern / Patrick's Tantrum
programme.desc: Plankton's Intern / Patrick's Tantrum - Plankton needs help stealing the formula, so he hires an intern who knows more about Mr. Krabs than anyone. // Patrick goes into a destructive fit whenever he hears a bell, so his friends help him in their own ways.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover - I Know What You Did This Summer
programme.desc: I Know What You Did This Summer - Max learns that Phoebe is working with Captain Perfect, and sets out to uncover the secret he is keeping. Chloe's crush invites her to a product launch party at Splat By The Sea, at the same time Jinx and Booch want her to protest outside the party.

programme.title: Danger Force - Chapa's Phone Home
programme.desc: Chapa's Phone Home - When Chapa's beloved long lost cell phone returns to the Man's Nest under mysterious circumstances, her hunt for the truth threatens to destroy Danger Force.

programme.title: Henry Danger - Diamonds Are For Heather
programme.desc: Diamonds Are For Heather - Kid Danger and Captain Man are called to the Swellview Museum of Stools and Jewels to protect the rare Neal Diamond from being stolen.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles - Bishop Makes Her Move
programme.desc: Bishop Makes Her Move - The origin of the woman called BISHOP! Why does she hate mutants? What is the secret of the Mechazoids? And exactly what happened the night the Turtles fell into Bishop's trap?

programme.title: Wylde Pak - The Boba-Get / Be Your Own Bean
programme.desc: The Boba-Get / Be Your Own Bean - Lil's favorite boba shop is closing! The kids try to save the café using pucker limes, but are quickly forced to save Canyon Valley from the pucker. // Lil and Min both realize how similar they are to their moms and set out to distinguish themselves.

programme.title: Wylde Pak - LAD
programme.desc: LAD - Determined to learn the truth about Jack's secret morning life, Lily does the unthinkable and wakes up early. But her sleuthing gets them both in big trouble.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Safe Deposit Krabs / Plankton's Pet
programme.desc: Safe Deposit Krabs / Plankton's Pet - Mr. Krabs gets trapped in Bikini Bottom’s brand-new bank, and it’s up to SpongeBob & Patrick to save him. // After failing again to steal the Krabby Patty formula, Plankton gets a pet to cheer himself up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Kenny the Cat / Yeti Krabs
programme.desc: Kenny the Cat / Yeti Krabs - SpongeBob will do anything to get to meet his newest hero, Kenny The Cat. // Attempting to get more work out of Squidward, Mr. Krabs spins the story of the monstrous Yeti Crab, which eats lazy workers.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Lost in Bikini Bottom / Tutor Sauce
programme.desc: Lost in Bikini Bottom / Tutor Sauce - SpongeBob tries to take a shortcut to work, but becomes lost along the way. // After failing his driver’s test again, Mr. Krabs decides to teach SpongeBob how to drive himself.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Bad Luck Bob
programme.desc: Bad Luck Bob - SpongeBob experiences a bad luck streak when his lucky tie clip suddenly goes missing.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show - The Drooling Fool / Patrick's Got An Alien Zoo Loose
programme.desc: The Drooling Fool / Patrick's Got An Alien Zoo Loose - Patrick's uncontrollable drooling gets out of hand and mouth. // A shape-shifting alien runs loose in the Star home.

programme.title: The Casagrandes - Grandparent Trap / Miss Step
programme.desc: Grandparent Trap / Miss Step - Ronnie Anne thinks her grandparent's marriage is in trouble after watching a relationship talk show. // Ronnie Anne learns the art of baile folklorico - and that her Tia Frida is one intense instructor!

programme.title: The Casagrandes - Slink or Swim / The Big Chill
programme.desc: Slink or Swim / The Big Chill - When Bobby finds out Carl can't swim, he offers to show him the ways of the waves! // After begging Abuelo for some A/C, the cousins decide to earn some cash at the neighborhood fair.

programme.title: The Casagrandes - Chancla Force / Fluff Love
programme.desc: Chancla Force / Fluff Love - Carl takes Rosa's chancla, setting off the balance of order in the city, & calling the Chancla Force into action! // Carlitos goes on a wild adventure to get his favorite stuffed animal from the arcade.

programme.title: The Casagrandes - Battle of the Grandpas / Prankaversary
programme.desc: Battle of the Grandpas / Prankaversary - When Frida's fun dad comes to visit, Hector tries to win back his grandchildren's attention. // Ronnie Anne and Lincoln are set for a big day of pranks and newbie Sid wants to join in on the fun too!

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish - A Dinosaur in Dimmadelphia / Fearless
programme.desc: A Dinosaur in Dimmadelphia / Fearless - When Hazel wishes to meet a dinosaur, Cosmo and Wanda bring a Baryonyx from the Cretaceous period to present day. // Hazel wishes Jasmine was fearless, but the wish goes awry when Jasmine's fears escape and invade the school!

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish - Wellsington Hotellsington / 1500 Minutes of Fame
programme.desc: Wellsington Hotellsington / 1500 Minutes of Fame - Hazel wishes her apartment building were a luxury hotel for a sleepover, but finds herself too busy to enjoy it with friends. // When Hazel's wish for 1,500 minutes of fame angers Principal Krentz, she must find a way to speed up time.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Goofy Scoopers / Pat the Dog
programme.desc: Goofy Scoopers / Pat the Dog - SpongeBob and Patrick make it their mission to reunite the recently fires robot band from Goofy Goober's. // Patrick is sent to the pound for acting like a worm, but he won't be able to leave unless SpongeBob can train him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Something Narwhal This Way Comes / C.H.U.M.S.
programme.desc: Something Narwhal This Way Comes / C.H.U.M.S. - Two familiar faces from SpongeBob's past visit Bikini Bottom, but they bring a big problem along with them. // After falling down the drain, Plankton finds an unlikely ally in the sewers.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - The Kwarantined Krab
programme.desc: The Kwarantined Krab - Mr. Krabs makes Spongebob and Squidward cook a fancy meal for Mrs. Puff, but every dish becomes a dispute.

programme.title: The Casagrandes - Operation Dad
programme.desc: Operation Dad - Ronnie Anne tries to convince her Dad to move to the city while he is visiting. With the help of Sid, she devices a plan that seems too good to fail.

programme.title: The Casagrandes - Flee Market / Copy Can't
programme.desc: Flee Market / Copy Can't - Bobby struggles to give up control of the mercado during his pizza-versary date with Lori. // When Ronnie Anne notices that she's the only person Carlitos won't copy, she's determined to change it!

programme.title: Wylde Pak - Warriors Against the Realm / Sunganduel
programme.desc: Warriors Against the Realm / Sunganduel - Lily introduces Jack to her favorite video game, but when he keeps losing, Jack binges the game and turns into a toxic troll. // Slice of life vignettes that illustrate the modern-day family dynamic.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish - Battle of Big Wand Pt 1 / Battle of Big Wand Pt 2
programme.desc: Battle of Big Wand Pt 1 / Battle of Big Wand Pt 2 - Hazel makes her one millionth wish which allows her one rule-free wish, but before she can make it, Dev and Irep take over Fairy World. Hazel must gather all her magical friends to take a stand against King Dev and his army of anti-fairies.

programme.title: Danger Force - Wedding of the Trentury
programme.desc: Wedding of the Trentury - Captain Man & Danger Force offer to host the ultimate wedding for Swellview's beloved newscaster Trent Overunder and his online girlfriend Tracy426. When they suspect Tracy426 isn't who she claims to be, their meddling threatens to ruin the big day.

programme.title: Danger Force - The Force Returns Part 2
programme.desc: The Force Returns Part 2 - As Swellview crumbles around them due to a lack of maternal energy, Danger Force and Captain Man must locate and return the moms to safety before corrupt officials take over the city forever.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover - Tide and Prejudice
programme.desc: Tide and Prejudice - The Thundermans are visited by High Tide, the former protector of Secret Shores. But when they explain to him that they are the new superheroes in town, he decides to take back his old role, even if it puts Jinx and Booch in danger.

programme.title: Henry Danger - Rubber Duck
programme.desc: Rubber Duck - When Ray accidentally destroys Henry's dad's prized remote control car, they throw a manicure/pedicure party to raise money to fix it.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles - Leonardo Saddles Up
programme.desc: Leonardo Saddles Up - The mutant seahorse called MUSTANG SALLY is going to flood the city... and the only thing standing in his way are LEO and Pigeon Pete. Being the leader isn't all it's cracked up to be.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show - Patrickle Jokes / Pat Roast
programme.desc: Patrickle Jokes / Pat Roast - Patrick and Squidina go undercover to investigate a corrupt novelty product factory. // The Patrick Show presents the "Roast of Patrick Star".

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - SpongeBob in Randomland / SpongeBob's Bad Habit
programme.desc: SpongeBob in Randomland / SpongeBob's Bad Habit - SpongeBob and Squidward take a delivery to a dreaded town where the laws of logic no longer apply. // SpongeBob can't stop biting his nails, but he also can't figure out why!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Handemonium / Breakin'
programme.desc: Handemonium / Breakin' - Plankton's giant Chum Bucket glove runs wild in town, but SpongeBob has a handy friend to help them out. // SpongeBob takes his first break ever at work, but how will he spend his precious time?

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Boss for a Day / The Goofy Newbie
programme.desc: Boss for a Day / The Goofy Newbie - Mr. Krabs has an accident and leaves SpongeBob in charge of the Krusty Krab. What could go wrong? // Patrick takes a job at the Goofy Goober when he finds out the employees get free ice cream.

programme.title: The Casagrandes - Fast Feud / Never Friending Story
programme.desc: Fast Feud / Never Friending Story - Ronnie Anne and Sid try to take down the obnoxious burger restaurant that opened up across the street. // After picking Par as his new best friend, Bobby realizes he may be in over his head.

programme.title: Wylde Pak - The Boba-Get / Be Your Own Bean
programme.desc: The Boba-Get / Be Your Own Bean - Lil's favorite boba shop is closing! The kids try to save the café using pucker limes, but are quickly forced to save Canyon Valley from the pucker. // Lil and Min both realize how similar they are to their moms and set out to distinguish themselves.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish - A Dinosaur in Dimmadelphia / Fearless
programme.desc: A Dinosaur in Dimmadelphia / Fearless - When Hazel wishes to meet a dinosaur, Cosmo and Wanda bring a Baryonyx from the Cretaceous period to present day. // Hazel wishes Jasmine was fearless, but the wish goes awry when Jasmine's fears escape and invade the school!

programme.title: The Casagrandes - Guilt Trip / Short cut
programme.desc: Guilt Trip / Short cut - Ronnie Anne and her primos try to win Maria a trip around the world. // When Carlota fails at hair cutting, she trains with the master barber himself - CJ!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Plankton Paranoia / Library Cards
programme.desc: Plankton Paranoia / Library Cards - Plankton hasn't tried to steal the secret formula in a while...and that's making Mr. Krabs nervous! // When Patrick discovers the pineapple's library, SpongeBob introduces him to the wonderful world of book learning!

programme.title: Henry Danger - Diamonds Are For Heather
programme.desc: Diamonds Are For Heather - Kid Danger and Captain Man are called to the Swellview Museum of Stools and Jewels to protect the rare Neal Diamond from being stolen.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover - Save the Date
programme.desc: Save the Date - Max bets Phoebe she can't turn off being a superhero and go on a normal date. Chloe helps Phoebe do well on the date, but Max tries to sabotage it by crying wolf. Suddenly, a real supervillain emerges and puts Max and Chloe in serious danger.

programme.title: Danger Force - Bilsky's Billions
programme.desc: Bilsky's Billions - When Mitch Bilsky enrolls at SWAG, Headmaster Ray and Danger Force use a combination of patience and powers to help him achieve the impossible and graduate high school.

programme.title: The Casagrandes - Just Be Coo / Tee'd Off
programme.desc: Just Be Coo / Tee'd Off - When Sancho gets himself into trouble in the city, Sergio helps him become a model pet! // Worried that Lori may have a new crush, Bobby visits her in college and tries to impress her with his golf skills.

programme.title: The Casagrandes - Lalo Land / Maybe-Sitter
programme.desc: Lalo Land / Maybe-Sitter - The Casagrandes prepare Lalo for his big audition to be Phoebe Powers' new canine sidekick! // With the adults out for the night, Bobby and Carlota take turns watching the kids - and going to a party!

programme.title: Wylde Pak - LAD / Before 10AM
programme.desc: LAD / Before 10AM - Determined to learn the truth about Jack's secret morning life, Lily does the unthinkable and wakes up early. But her sleuthing gets them both in big trouble. // Lil and her BFFs Anusha & Debs fight to win the coveted trophy at Hank N Beans arcade.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles - Donnie Hangs Tough
programme.desc: Donnie Hangs Tough - It's a battle of the wits between Donnie and Bishop as he races through NYC's subway system to stop her evil Mechazoids. But how do you beat an AI that counters your every move?

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Mind the Gap / Dirty Bubble Returns
programme.desc: Mind the Gap / Dirty Bubble Returns - Squidward closes the gap in SpongeBob's teeth, which causes a dramatic and unexpected change in his demeanor. // The newly reformed "Clean Bubble" takes a dishwashing job at the Krusty Krab, where he is tempted by the grime.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Jolly Lodgers / Biddy Sitting
programme.desc: Jolly Lodgers / Biddy Sitting - Squidward packs his bags after his house gets infested, but a different kind of pest waits at his hotel. // SpongeBob and Patrick get tricked into babysitting a grouchy old lady, who does all she can to escape.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - SpongeBob in Randomland / SpongeBob's Bad Habit
programme.desc: SpongeBob in Randomland / SpongeBob's Bad Habit - SpongeBob and Squidward take a delivery to a dreaded town where the laws of logic no longer apply. // SpongeBob can't stop biting his nails, but he also can't figure out why!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - PL-1413 / In the Mood to Feud
programme.desc: PL-1413 / In the Mood to Feud - Plankton travels two thousand years into the future and finds a few unfamiliar faces. // SpongeBob, Patrick, and Sandy find themselves in the middle of a long-standing feud between the Narwhals and the Planktons.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show - Star-Robics / Who's the Dummy Now?
programme.desc: Star-Robics / Who's the Dummy Now? - In this fitness variety show, Patrick learns how to exercise. // A family of dummies move into the Star home.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles - Mikey Does The Right Thing
programme.desc: Mikey Does The Right Thing - To save his brothers, Mikey needs the help of Bishop's intern, ROD. But Rod wants something in return... to be turned into a MUTANT! To save the day, Mikey has to become... RESPONSIBLE.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles - Raph Thinks It Through
programme.desc: Raph Thinks It Through - Raph's strength won't save him when he's caught between the Mechazoids and the notorious street gang known as Purple Dragons! Raph's going to have to use his head to get out of this one!

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish - Peace of Pizza / A New Dev-Elopment
programme.desc: Peace of Pizza / A New Dev-Elopment - When Dev refuses to participate in Kindness Day, Hazel summons an intergalactic species of diplomats to reason with him. // Hazel learns more about her nemesis, Dev, when forced to work with him on a class project.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish - Growing Pains
programme.desc: Growing Pains - When Hazel wishes to be 13 to get into a movie, the fairy version of puberty hits her all at once!

programme.title: The Smurfs - Storm Loses her Mojo / Pop Out
programme.desc: Storm Loses her Mojo / Pop Out - After chanting a spell to get in touch with her inner warrior, Blossom unknowingly takes Storm's warrior spirit. // Gargamel casts a spell over Grouchy which makes everything that he complains about appear inside his hovel.

programme.title: The Smurfs - Knight Smurfalot / Forget Me What?
programme.desc: Knight Smurfalot / Forget Me What? - Dreamer tries to become a knight, but his annoying antics make him some new enemies that land him in danger. // When Gargamel accidentally breathes in the pollen of a rare flower it instantly wipes his memory.

programme.title: The Smurfs - The Smurfs Show
programme.desc: The Smurfs Show - Gargamel plants a crystal ball to spy on the Smurfs, but they turn the tables on him with a fabricated drama.

programme.title: The Casagrandes - Skaters Gonna Hate / Born to Be Mild
programme.desc: Skaters Gonna Hate / Born to Be Mild - Ronnie Anne and her pals enlist Carlos X as their coach in a skate-off against Tony Hawk! // Tired of the bullies at school, Alexis learns the tough guy ropes from Carl.

programme.title: The Casagrandes - The Bros in the Band / For the Record
programme.desc: The Bros in the Band / For the Record - Bobby's dream of playing in a band might finally come true, but can he hang with Par's punk pals? // Worried he's not keeping up with his cool friends, Sameer tries to break a record for some street cred.

programme.title: The Casagrandes - The Golden Curse
programme.desc: The Golden Curse - The Casagrandes celebrate Paco's wedding, but they need to find las arras that Sergio lost!

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show - Chopping Spree / All Bot Myself
programme.desc: Chopping Spree / All Bot Myself - Pat The Hapless goes on a barbaric quest to the shopping mall. // After Captain Quasar replaces Pat-Tron with a more efficient robot, Pat-Tron works for the Star family.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Bubble Bass's Tab / Kooky Cooks
programme.desc: Bubble Bass's Tab / Kooky Cooks - Bubble Bass avoids paying his bill at the Krusty Krab, so SpongeBob and Squidward are sent to collect the cash. // Mr. Krabs makes Spongebob and Squidward cook a fancy meal for Mrs. Puff, but every dish becomes a dispute.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Krusty Koncessionaires / Dream Hoppers
programme.desc: Krusty Koncessionaires / Dream Hoppers - The Krusty Krab crew goes to a big concert to sell krabby patties in the stands. // SpongeBob explores the melodious dreamscapes of his sleeping neighbors.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - A Place for Pets / Lockdown for Love
programme.desc: A Place for Pets / Lockdown for Love - When customers bring pets into the Krusty Krab, Mr. Krabs soon realizes pets are more profitable than owners. // Plankton ruins another date with Karen, so she puts the Chum Bucket on lockdown until he proves his affection.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover - The Summer I Turned Giddy
programme.desc: The Summer I Turned Giddy - Upset that Phoebe has a new partner, Max decides to partner with his friend Gideon. But things backfire when Max tries to turn Gideon into a supersized superhero. Chloe's friends pretend to be wealthy so they can bond with her new crush.

programme.title: Danger Force - Uncle Hambone
programme.desc: Uncle Hambone - When Chapa's little sister needs her help during a city-wide blackout, the rest of Danger Force cross the line as they try to pull her back to power up the Man's Nest and help them win a contest.

programme.title: Henry Danger - Meet Cute Crush
programme.desc: Meet Cute Crush - Henry and Ray try to help Piper carry out a "meet cute" with a new boy she likes from school.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles - Night Of The Mechazoids
programme.desc: Night Of The Mechazoids - The Turtles take the fight to Bishop but she's ready for them... get ready for MECHA-BIHSOP! But when the Mechazoids go out of control, can the Turtles save humanity?

programme.title: Wylde Pak - Meats of Strength / Dead Ed's
programme.desc: Meats of Strength / Dead Ed's - Jack's new friend Beef invites him to a sleepover. Jack, a sleepover newb, freaks out over impressing his new friend. // Jack & Lil try to prove they're the one true local, enduring a series of bizarre quests in the local dive restaurant Dead Ed's.

programme.title: Wylde Pak - Before 10AM
programme.desc: Before 10AM - Lil and her BFFs Anusha & Debs fight to win the coveted trophy at Hank N Beans arcade.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Company Picnic / Pull Up a Barrel
programme.desc: Company Picnic / Pull Up a Barrel - Mr. Krabs throws a company picnic to boost morale, but Plankton is hosting his own on the same day! // Mr. Krabs regales SpongeBob with tales from his old Navy days.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Sanctuary! / What's Eating Patrick?
programme.desc: Sanctuary! / What's Eating Patrick? - When stray snails start appearing around Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob decides to care for them himself. // To defend Bikini Bottom’s honor, Patrick enters a Krabby Patty eating competition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Patrick! The Game / The Sewers of Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: Patrick! The Game / The Sewers of Bikini Bottom - Patrick invents a new board game, and invites SpongeBob, Sandy and Squidward to play it with him. // After accidentally flushing Mr. Krabs’ safe, SpongeBob and Squidward must go into the sewers to find it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - The Sandman Cometh
programme.desc: The Sandman Cometh - When Patrick can't fall asleep, he seeks assistance from the Sandman.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show - The Patterfly Effect / A Space Affair to Remember
programme.desc: The Patterfly Effect / A Space Affair to Remember - Patrick messes with the space-time continuum. // While Cecil and Bunny celebrate their anniversary in outer space, Patrick and Squidina throw a house party.

programme.title: The Casagrandes - Karma Chameleon / Team Effort
programme.desc: Karma Chameleon / Team Effort - The Changs go on vacation, leaving Ronnie Anne and her cousins to look after Cam, the chameleon snake. // Ronnie Anne and her skate buddies work together to show their coach they can make a good team.

programme.title: The Casagrandes - Guess Who's Shopping for Dinner? / New Roomie
programme.desc: Guess Who's Shopping for Dinner? / New Roomie - Abuela teaches Ronnie Anne that getting ingredients for dinner is no small task. // When Vito's apartment floods, the kids try to find an apartment that suits him best.

programme.title: The Casagrandes - Zoo-mergency!
programme.desc: Zoo-mergency! - After a zoo fundraiser goes wrong, Sid must save the day with her family!

programme.title: The Casagrandes - Just Be Coo / Tee'd Off
programme.desc: Just Be Coo / Tee'd Off - When Sancho gets himself into trouble in the city, Sergio helps him become a model pet! // Worried that Lori may have a new crush, Bobby visits her in college and tries to impress her with his golf skills.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish - 28 Puddings Later / Trial and Hair-ror
programme.desc: 28 Puddings Later / Trial and Hair-ror - When Hazel tries to make Pudding Day at school fair for everyone, she accidentally starts a pudding apocalypse. // When Hazel wishes her hair had "spirit" for a school contest, she finds it has more personality than she bargained for!

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish - Weird Science / Murder She Wished
programme.desc: Weird Science / Murder She Wished - When Hazel procrastinates on a science fair project, Cosmo and Wanda rewrite the laws of science to make it work. // When Hazel's landlord goes missing, she makes a wish to get to the bottom of the case!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Potato Puff / There Will Be Grease!
programme.desc: Potato Puff / There Will Be Grease! - Mrs. Puff's new substitute teacher gives SpongeBob a crash course in driving. // Mr. Krabs and Plankton must work together after discovering a well of miracle-grease under their restaurants.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Big Bad Bubble Bass / Sea-Man Sponge Haters Club
programme.desc: Big Bad Bubble Bass / Sea-Man Sponge Haters Club - Karen tells the fairytale of a nerd trying to steal an action figure from his three little neighbors. // Squidward hosts a secret "We Hate SpongeBob Club" at his house.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Plankton's Intern
programme.desc: Plankton's Intern - Plankton needs help stealing the formula, so he hires an intern who knows more about Mr. Krabs than anyone.

programme.title: The Casagrandes - Away Game / Monster Cash
programme.desc: Away Game / Monster Cash - Abuela worries that Ronnie Anne and Bobby will want to live at their Dad's new apartment instead. // Carl hosts a haunted tour based on Abuela's tale of 'El Cucuy,' and learns that it may not be fiction.

programme.title: The Casagrandes - Trend Game / This Bird Has Flown
programme.desc: Trend Game / This Bird Has Flown - When Ronnie Anne realizes that she's not up to date on all of the latest trends, she seeks help from Carlota. // Bobby struggles to find Sergio after wishing he would fly away and never come back.

programme.title: Wylde Pak - The Meatball of Canyon Valley / Sticky Fingers
programme.desc: The Meatball of Canyon Valley / Sticky Fingers - When Halmoni chooses Jack over Lil to be her Trot dance competition partner, jealous Lil seeks revenge. / Min asks Jack to run a simple errand, but Charlie the gibbon intervenes, sending Jack and Lil chasing after him into the town's abandoned mines.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish - Stuck in my Head / Mind the Gap
programme.desc: Stuck in my Head / Mind the Gap - When Hazel, Winn, and Jasmine fail a BFF Compatibility Test, Hazel makes a wish that lands them inside her mind. // When Hazel wishes she didn't have a gap in her teeth, the Tooth Fairy fills her gap with an obnoxious talking tooth.

programme.title: Danger Force - Villains' Night
programme.desc: Villains' Night - Danger Force and Captain Man go undercover as bad guys at The Beatin' Dungeon to catch a criminal. If their cover is blown, they'll have to fight all of Swellview's toughest villains at once.

programme.title: Danger Force - Mime Games
programme.desc: Mime Games - When Danger Force and Captain Man are called to Paris to protect France's national treasures, Bose is accidentally left alone to try and stop The Toddler from breaking into The Man's Nest.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover - Prank U Next
programme.desc: Prank U Next - Max seeks help dealing with a mystery prankster at school from his old principal, who was always the target of his pranks. But Max fails to stop the pranks and quits the mission, prompting Chloe to confess that she was the prankster all along.

programme.title: Henry Danger - Super Volcano
programme.desc: Super Volcano - Activity in a dormant super volcano under Swellview makes Henry and Ray think the world is ending. Piper is convinced she has a gluten intolerance.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles - The Pearl
programme.desc: The Pearl - The East River 3 are on the verge of victory! The Turtles and Mutanimals must team up to stop them, but not everything is as it seems... what is the PEARL and why does Goldfin want it?

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show - All Out of Idea Bricks / A Fool Schooled
programme.desc: All Out of Idea Bricks / A Fool Schooled - Patrick and Squidina follow a runaway idea brick into Randomland. // After discovering that Patrick never finished behavioral training, the family home-schools him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Knock Knock, Who's There? / Pat Hearts Squid
programme.desc: Knock Knock, Who's There? / Pat Hearts Squid - SpongeBob watches Mr. Krabs's house while he's away, so he takes extreme measures to make sure no one breaks in. // Squidward is forced to room with Patrick, but his domineering demeanor rubs off on Patrick more than he'd like.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Lighthouse Louie / Hiccup Plague
programme.desc: Lighthouse Louie / Hiccup Plague - SpongeBob cleans out the boating school lighthouse, where he finds a cute but inconvenient companion. // No one in Bikini Bottom is safe from a case of contagious hiccups.

programme.title: The Casagrandes - Fool's Gold / Flight Plan

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Call the Cops! / Surf N' Turf

programme.title: Henry Danger - Meet Cute Crush
programme.desc: Meet Cute Crush - Henry and Ray try to help Piper carry out a "meet cute" with a new boy she likes from school.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover - Cherry Bad Things
programme.desc: Cherry Bad Things - Cherry visits, and the Thundermans discover she still has her superpowers. Cherry promises to remove them after her girls' day with Phoebe and Chloe, but the powers malfunction and puts the group in danger. Max hosts Jinx, making Colosso jealous.

programme.title: Danger Force - Jack the Clipper
programme.desc: Jack the Clipper - When a mysterious new barber attacks Swellview with a string of terrible haircuts, it's up to Danger Force to uncover their identity before their own hair gets chopped

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Knock Knock, Who's There? / Pat Hearts Squid

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Mooned! / Hysterical History

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles - Donnie Hangs Tough
programme.desc: Donnie Hangs Tough - It's a battle of the wits between Donnie and Bishop as he races through NYC's subway system to stop her evil Mechazoids. But how do you beat an AI that counters your every move?

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles - Bishop Makes Her Move
programme.desc: Bishop Makes Her Move - The origin of the woman called BISHOP! Why does she hate mutants? What is the secret of the Mechazoids? And exactly what happened the night the Turtles fell into Bishop's trap?

programme.title: The Smurfs - Order of Merit / Smurfy Mother's Day!
programme.desc: Order of Merit / Smurfy Mother's Day! - When Brainy bosses all the Smurfs around one time too many, Jokey makes him compete for a fake award. // When they get captured by Gargamel, Papa Smurf, Willow and Vanity offer to help the sorcerer impress his mother.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Say 'Awww!'/ Patrick the Mailman
programme.desc: Say 'Awww!'/ Patrick the Mailman - Frustrated that he's seen as cute instead of evil, Plankton builds a robot to punish anyone who says "aww!" // Patrick crushes the mailman, so he and SpongeBob deliver the mail around Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover - Cruel Summer
programme.desc: Cruel Summer - Max and Phoebe are working well as a team, until he is accused of committing crimes and Phoebe must apprehend him. Now on the lam, Max learns that the Mastermind's henchman is secretly controlling his actions via a chip in his neck.

programme.title: Danger Force - Class Action Heroes
programme.desc: Class Action Heroes - Danger Force is crushing it at Swellview Junior High, but Ray misses his sidekicks and schemes to get them out of school.

programme.title: Henry Danger - Up The Stairs!
programme.desc: Up The Stairs! - When a local celebrity chef comes to Junk-N-Stuff to do his live show, Kid Danger and Captain Man are forced to hike a half a mile up the Man Stairs so they can be on the show.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles - Mikey Takes Charge
programme.desc: Mikey Takes Charge - Mikey and Genghis Frog are sent into the storm on a supply run to the local market when they encounter the electrifying LEE THE EEL! Now Mikey has to step up and be a LEADER!

programme.title: Wylde Pak - Best Summer Ever?
programme.desc: Best Summer Ever? - Jack & Lily are half-siblings living on opposite ends of the world both hoping to have the "best summer ever." When dangerous events forces Jack's mom to send him to live with his dad, the kids fear their summer dreams have become a nightmare.

programme.title: Wylde Pak - Sunganduel
programme.desc: Sunganduel - Slice of life vignettes that illustrate the modern-day family dynamic.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Sandy's Nutmare / Bulletin Board
programme.desc: Sandy's Nutmare / Bulletin Board - Sandy creates the latest acorn-based food sensation, but her tree pays the price for her greed. // SpongeBob erects a community bulletin board in the Krusty Krab, but anonymous reviews posted on it lead to trouble.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Food Con Castaways / Snail Mail
programme.desc: Food Con Castaways / Snail Mail - The gang heads to a food convention, but things go awry when they become stranded in the woods. // SpongeBob accidentally fibs to his pen pal, but when his friend comes to visit, he must keep the ruse going!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Pineapple Invasion / Salsa Imbecilicus
programme.desc: Pineapple Invasion / Salsa Imbecilicus - When SpongeBob hides the secret formula in his home, it’s up to Gary to protect it from Plankton. // When a freak accident causes everyone in town to become as stupid as Patrick, Sandy must save the day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Student Driver Survivor
programme.desc: Student Driver Survivor - When a competitor threatens to shut down Mrs. Puff's boating school, she must rely on SpongeBob to stay in business.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show - Little Patscals / The Pre-Historic Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Little Patscals / The Pre-Historic Patrick Star Show - Patrick learns what GrandPat's childhood was like. // Cave Pat hosts a show with his cave family.

programme.title: The Casagrandes - What's Love Gato Do With It? / Dial M. For Mustard
programme.desc: What's Love Gato Do With It? / Dial M. For Mustard - After a magician hypnotizes Bobby into thinking he's a cat, the family needs to snap him out of it! // Ronnie Anne and her friends uncover a town mystery: what happened to Bruno's hot dog cart?

programme.title: The Casagrandes - The Kid Plays in the Picture / Achy Breaky Art
programme.desc: The Kid Plays in the Picture / Achy Breaky Art - Carl's love for toys gets him caught up in a whirlwind toy review career. // Frida's art gets a bad review, the kids try to stage a new auction to lift her spirits.

programme.title: The Casagrandes - Operation Popstar
programme.desc: Operation Popstar - Ronnie Anne and Sid try to get Yoon Kwan's autograph and Carlota helps Alisa prepare for the Great Lakes City Music Festival!

programme.title: The Casagrandes - Strife Coach / Gossip Girl
programme.desc: Strife Coach / Gossip Girl - Ronnie Anne and her friends help get Mrs. Kernicky hired as the new PE coach, but her classes are no joke! // When a Sid secret is leaked at school, Ronnie Anne and Sid wonder if they can continue being best buds!

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish - Cookie's Court / Work Her Magic
programme.desc: Cookie's Court / Work Her Magic - After losing Hazel to Cosmo and Wanda during the Wish Trials, a scheming Cookie returns for revenge .// Frustrated by her mom's split attention between work and home, Hazel wishes to be her assistant to spend more time with her.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish - Lost and Founders Day Pt. 1 / Lost and Founders Day Pt. 2
programme.desc: Lost and Founders Day Pt. 1 / Lost and Founders Day Pt. 2 - Dev's dad, tech magnate Dale Dimmadome, creates an app designed to track kids' wants at the annual Founder's Day Festival, but Hazel shows up as an anomaly thanks to Cosmo and Wanda's wish granting. Dale programs giant robots to track her down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Captain Pipsqueak/Plane to Sea
programme.desc: Captain Pipsqueak/Plane to Sea - Plankton joins the League of E.V.I.L. // SpongeBob and Patrick take Squidward on a plane to a tropical resort.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Abandon Twits / Wallhalla
programme.desc: Abandon Twits / Wallhalla - The Krusty Krew builds a boat for their penny-pinching captain. // SpongeBob discovers a crazed castaway living in his walls.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Bubble Bass's Tab
programme.desc: Bubble Bass's Tab - Bubble Bass avoids paying his bill at the Krusty Krab, so SpongeBob and Squidward are sent to collect the cash.

programme.title: The Casagrandes - Grandparent Trap / Miss Step
programme.desc: Grandparent Trap / Miss Step - Ronnie Anne thinks her grandparent's marriage is in trouble after watching a relationship talk show. // Ronnie Anne learns the art of baile folklorico - and that her Tia Frida is one intense instructor!

programme.title: The Casagrandes - Slink or Swim / The Big Chill
programme.desc: Slink or Swim / The Big Chill - When Bobby finds out Carl can't swim, he offers to show him the ways of the waves! // After begging Abuelo for some A/C, the cousins decide to earn some cash at the neighborhood fair.

programme.title: Wylde Pak - Journey to the Otter Side
programme.desc: Journey to the Otter Side - The family's excited to take Jack to Lake World, Lily's favorite theme park. But when a lackluster day ends with realizing Lily's favorite ride has vanished, the kids must survive a thrilling adventure to find it and save their vacation.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish - Stuck in my Head / Mind the Gap
programme.desc: Stuck in my Head / Mind the Gap - When Hazel, Winn, and Jasmine fail a BFF Compatibility Test, Hazel makes a wish that lands them inside her mind. // When Hazel wishes she didn't have a gap in her teeth, the Tooth Fairy fills her gap with an obnoxious talking tooth.

programme.title: Danger Force - Mika in the Middle
programme.desc: Mika in the Middle - Mika gets a fine lesson on the art of not snitching, but a surprise from Schwoz's Mom might cause her to fail the test.

programme.title: Danger Force - Return of the Kid
programme.desc: Return of the Kid - Henry Hart's back and stealing Ray's attention from crime fighting so Danger Force is forced to go on a bunch of exhausting missions without Captain Man. But the mood dims when a scary Bounty Hunter from Dystopia comes to Swellview looking for Henry.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover - Summer of Secrets
programme.desc: Summer of Secrets - Chloe must attend summer school, and Max is assigned to be her teacher. While they will be busy all summer, Phoebe decides to go solo on missions. She meets a new superhero named Captain Perfect, and discovers they make a good crime-fighting team.

programme.title: Henry Danger - Dodging Danger
programme.desc: Dodging Danger - When Henry uses his new super power to compete in a Dodge-A-Leen tournament, Ray, Schwoz, and Charlotte go undercover to teach Henry a lesson.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles - Mikey Does The Right Thing
programme.desc: Mikey Does The Right Thing - To save his brothers, Mikey needs the help of Bishop's intern, ROD. But Rod wants something in return... to be turned into a MUTANT! To save the day, Mikey has to become... RESPONSIBLE.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show - Sitcom Stars / The Show Must Go Yawn
programme.desc: Sitcom Stars / The Show Must Go Yawn - When Cecil's boss visits the house, the Stars get trapped in a sitcom. // When Squidina is bedridden, Patrick has to run his show without her.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Krusty Koncessionaires / Dream Hoppers
programme.desc: Krusty Koncessionaires / Dream Hoppers - The Krusty Krab crew goes to a big concert to sell krabby patties in the stands. // SpongeBob explores the melodious dreamscapes of his sleeping neighbors.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - A Place for Pets / Lockdown for Love
programme.desc: A Place for Pets / Lockdown for Love - When customers bring pets into the Krusty Krab, Mr. Krabs soon realizes pets are more profitable than owners. // Plankton ruins another date with Karen, so she puts the Chum Bucket on lockdown until he proves his affection.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants - Goofy Scoopers / Pat the Dog
programme.desc: Goofy Scoopers / Pat the Dog - SpongeBob and Patrick make it their mission to reunite the recently fires robot band from Goofy Goober's. // Patrick is sent to the pound for acting like a worm, but he won't be able to leave unless SpongeBob can train him.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP10: EMMANUEL ADEBAYOR
programme.desc: EP10: EMMANUEL ADEBAYOR - With 97 Premier League goals for some of the biggest clubs in English football, Emmanuel Adebayor was one of Africa’s finest footballers to play on these shores. Now, through his SEA Foundation, Adebayor is making a significant impact off the pitch, providing inspiration and opportunity for people in Togo and across the continent. This week, in support of the Premier League’s No Room For Racism Campaign, The Big Interview sits down with the former African footballer of the year to discuss his challenges in early life, his colourful career, his charitable work around the globe and the influence and importance of different cultures in the Premier League.

programme.title: LIVE Studio: PL MOMENTS - EP03: RAY PARLOUR
programme.desc: EP03: RAY PARLOUR - Ray Parlour joins Will Perry in the changing room to reveal his 10 favourite Premier League moments. A must-watch for any Arsenal fan and football fan alike, packed full of stories about the club's greatest players, and of course that Invincible winning season.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP24: HALL OF FAME EVENT NIGHT
programme.desc: EP24: HALL OF FAME EVENT NIGHT - We head to London to unveil the two newest inductee’s into the Premier League Hall of fame. Hosted by Kelly Cates, and with a who’s who of footballing royalty in attendance, we go behind the curtain to give you exclusive access to the hottest ticket in town.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP14:
programme.desc: EP14: - Extended sit-downs and more informal ‘out and about’ interviews with the Premier League’s biggest stars, providing players with a platform to tell their story in their own words.

programme.title: Classic Match - ARS v TOT
programme.desc: ARS v TOT - We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2011/2012 season.

programme.title: Review of the Season - 2011/2012 (MNC)
programme.desc: 2011/2012 (MNC) - A review of all the best goals, action and drama from Premier League seasons past.

programme.title: REWIND - EP20: MCI v QPR 11/12
programme.desc: EP20: MCI v QPR 11/12 - Manchester City v QPR on the final day of the 2011/12 season will forever be remembered as the most dramatic of finales to a Premier League season. Shaun Wright-Phillips and Joleon Lescott offer the perspective from both sides, with the final day drama at the Etihad set in the context of Manchester City’s Run-In and their pursuit of a first Premier League Title.

programme.title: REWIND - EP07: HARRY KEWELL: MY PL YEARS
programme.desc: EP07: HARRY KEWELL: MY PL YEARS - Arriving in England on a scholarship at the age of 15, Harry Kewell went on to become one of the greatest Australian footballers to have played the game. He looks back at some of his most memorable Premier League moments at Leeds United and Liverpool.

programme.title: PL GOATS - EP03: AUSTRALIAN STARS
programme.desc: EP03: AUSTRALIAN STARS - No Australian has made more Premier League appearances than Mark Schwarzer, so who better to decide on the true Australian GOAT from those who have made the journey from Down Under to the Premier League.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP13
programme.desc: EP13 - The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: REVIEW - SUN 09 NOV
programme.desc: SUN 09 NOV - Review covers all the action from Matchweek 11, kicking off with Spurs versus Man United, West Ham host Burnley, and for the game of the weekend in Man City’s head to head clash with Liverpool.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP09: NEWCASTLE UNITED - NOT IN MY LIFETIME
programme.desc: EP09: NEWCASTLE UNITED - NOT IN MY LIFETIME - Newcastle United are a team on the rise under Eddie Howe; a manager quietly rewriting the modern history of the club. With exclusive access and interviews from inside St. James’ Park, we uncover the transformation Howe has led, from stabilising the team to delivering silverware and reigniting belief on Tyneside. As the Magpies set their sights on even greater heights, we ask just how far he can take this ambitious, resurgent club.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP06: THE ENTERTAINERS
programme.desc: EP06: THE ENTERTAINERS - Nicknamed ‘The Entertainers’, Kevin Keegan’s Newcastle team of the 1995-96 season set the Premier League alight with their confidence and flair that took them agonisingly close to winning their first Premier League title. In this show, we speak to those that were part of that incredible journey and reflect on some of those unforgettable moments that captured hearts and forever changing the club's legacy.

programme.title: Classic Match - ARS v TOT
programme.desc: ARS v TOT - We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2008/2009 season.

programme.title: LIVE Studio: PL MOMENTS - EP14: ROBERT PIRES
programme.desc: EP14: ROBERT PIRES - Arsenal legend and Invincible, Robert Pires looks back on his greatest Premier League moments, counting down his top 10 from his unforgettable career in England. From stunning goals to title-winning performances, Pires reflects on the moments that defined his time in the league, sharing personal insights and behind the scenes stories along the way.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP18: THE INVINCIBLES
programme.desc: EP18: THE INVINCIBLES - Widely regarded as one of the best teams in Premier League history, we speak to the players who formed part of the Arsenal Invincibles of the 2003-04 season and hear about the behind the scenes stories and funny anecdotes from that unforgettable league win. With contributions from Thierry Henry, Patrick Vieira, Dennis Bergkamp, Freddie Ljungberg, Ray Parlour and Martin Keown.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP06: THE ENTERTAINERS
programme.desc: EP06: THE ENTERTAINERS - Nicknamed ‘The Entertainers’, Kevin Keegan’s Newcastle team of the 1995-96 season set the Premier League alight with their confidence and flair that took them agonisingly close to winning their first Premier League title. In this show, we speak to those that were part of that incredible journey and reflect on some of those unforgettable moments that captured hearts and forever changing the club's legacy.

programme.title: REWIND - EP19: LES FERDINAND - NEWCASTLE RUN IN 95/96
programme.desc: EP19: LES FERDINAND - NEWCASTLE RUN IN 95/96 - Still the only team in Premier League history to throw away a 12-point lead, Les Ferdinand tells the story of Newcastle’s agonising Run-In, where Kevin Keegan’s side were pipped to the title by Manchester United.

programme.title: REWIND - EP04: STUART DALLAS: LEEDS 20/21
programme.desc: EP04: STUART DALLAS: LEEDS 20/21 - Marcelo Bielsa brought Premier League football back to Leeds in 2020, following a 16 year exile from the top flight. Amidst the backdrop of a global pandemic, Bielsa’s full-throttle tactics made Leeds the story of the season. Stuart Dallas recalls the highlights.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2020/2021 (MNC)
programme.desc: 2020/2021 (MNC) - A review of all the best goals, action and drama from Premier League seasons past.

Hosted by Kelly Cates, and with a who’s who of footballing royalty in attendance, we go behind the curtain to give you exclusive access to the hottest ticket in town.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP03: (Subbed) PL GOALSCORERS
programme.desc: EP03: (Subbed) PL GOALSCORERS - We celebrate the greatest goalscorers in Premier League history; the icons whose instinct, power, and flair have lit up stadiums and etched their names into footballing folklore. From Alan Shearer’s relentless consistency to Thierry Henry’s elegance, Sergio Agüero’s killer instinct to Harry Kane’s rise, we relive the moments that defined an era.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON - 2017/2018 (GB: SALAH)
programme.desc: 2017/2018 (GB: SALAH) - We take a look back at some of the most spectacular and important goals from previous Premier League seasons.

programme.title: Classic Match - BOU v WHU
programme.desc: BOU v WHU - We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2017/2018 season.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP18: BOURNEMOUTH - FROM THE BRINK
programme.desc: EP18: BOURNEMOUTH - FROM THE BRINK - In 2024/25, AFC Bournemouth smashed their club record with 56 Premier League points, but less than 20 years earlier, they were drowning in debt and fighting for survival. This is the story of a club that defied the odds, silenced the doubters, and rose to become a certified Premier League contender, with their eyes set on Europe.

programme.title: LIVE Studio: PL MOMENTS - EP07: BOURNEMOUTH
programme.desc: EP07: BOURNEMOUTH - Matt Richie and Charlie Daniels are the guests for a special edition of PL Moments which discusses Bournemouth’s rise from administration to the Premier League.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP14:
programme.desc: EP14: - Extended sit-downs and more informal ‘out and about’ interviews with the Premier League’s biggest stars, providing players with a platform to tell their story in their own words.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP03: WAYNE ROONEY HALL OF FAME SPECIAL
programme.desc: EP03: WAYNE ROONEY HALL OF FAME SPECIAL - With 208 goals in 491 top flight appearances, Wayne Rooney is widely regarded as one of the best strikers to have played in the League. We sit down with the Englishman to discuss the moments that made him a legend and helped him rightly earn his place in the Premier League Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Classic Match - MUN v EVE
programme.desc: MUN v EVE - We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2011/2012 season.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP03: MICHAEL CARRICK
programme.desc: EP03: MICHAEL CARRICK - With 481 Premier League appearances and five titles ? Michael Carrick is a Premier League icon. Carrick sits down with Premier League Moments to look back over his glittering career ? from the West Ham youth academy through to being a key figure in Sir Alex’s Ferguson’s Manchester United side. In addition to his Premier League career, he also reflects on winning the Champions League, Europa League, the FA Cup as well as his international career.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP52: CHAMPIONS STORY
programme.desc: EP52: CHAMPIONS STORY - We dive into the fiercest rivalry in English football?Manchester United and Liverpool. As Liverpool draw level with United’s record haul of top-flight titles, this is a story of history, pride, and the relentless pursuit of greatness. With insight from icons on both sides?Ian Rush, Lou Macari, Brian Kidd, Michael Owen, Phil Thompson, and new Liverpool boss Arne Slot, we unpack the moments that have defined generations, split families, and lit up the Premier League. From legendary goals to seismic title races, this is the story of two giants locked in a battle for supremacy. Woven through it all is the significance of Liverpool’s record-equalling achievement?a milestone that adds a powerful new chapter to football’s greatest rivalry.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON - 2024/2025 (GB: SALAH)
programme.desc: 2024/2025 (GB: SALAH) - From free-kicks to solo runs, scissor kicks to 30-yard screamers, Goals of the Season revisits some of the most memorable strikes from the 24/25 campaign, whilst paying homage to the Golden Boot winner.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - EP11
programme.desc: EP11 - Fast-paced with music, ISO angles, and commentary, Netbusters offers an alternative review of every goal and key moment from the latest round of Premier League fixtures.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP12: (Subbed) OLIVIER GIROUD
programme.desc: EP12: (Subbed) OLIVIER GIROUD - We follow the remarkable journey of Olivier Giroud, from his Premier League days with Arsenal and Chelsea to Champions League glory and beyond. A World Cup winner known for his elegance and resilience, Giroud’s career has taken him from London to Milan, then to LA, and now back home with a move to Lille. As he begins this new chapter, we reflect on the highs, the hurdles, and the legacy of one of football’s most underrated and enduring strikers.
