programme.desc: EP12: (Subbed) OLIVIER GIROUD - We follow the remarkable journey of Olivier Giroud, from his Premier League days with Arsenal and Chelsea to Champions League glory and beyond. A World Cup winner known for his elegance and resilience, Giroud’s career has taken him from London to Milan, then to LA, and now back home with a move to Lille. As he begins this new chapter, we reflect on the highs, the hurdles, and the legacy of one of football’s most underrated and enduring strikers.

programme.title: LIVE Studio: PL MOMENTS - EP09: THIERRY HENRY'S TOP 10 PL MOMENTS
programme.desc: EP09: THIERRY HENRY'S TOP 10 PL MOMENTS - Arguably the greatest striker the Premier League has ever seen, Thierry Henry sits down with Will Perry to reveal his Top 10 Premier League Moments.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP03: (Subbed) PL GOALSCORERS
programme.desc: EP03: (Subbed) PL GOALSCORERS - We celebrate the greatest goalscorers in Premier League history; the icons whose instinct, power, and flair have lit up stadiums and etched their names into footballing folklore. From Alan Shearer’s relentless consistency to Thierry Henry’s elegance, Sergio Agüero’s killer instinct to Harry Kane’s rise, we relive the moments that defined an era.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP21: (Subbed) SANDRO TONALI
programme.desc: EP21: (Subbed) SANDRO TONALI - We follow the rise of one of Italy’s most gifted midfielders and his journey to Premier League stardom at Newcastle United, Sandro Tonali. From his early days at Brescia, where his talent drew comparisons to Italian greats, to his development at AC Milan and eventual move to St. James’ Park, we trace Tonali’s evolution on and off the pitch. With insight from former coaches in Italy and those guiding his Premier League transition, we explore how his vision, composure, and work ethic quickly endeared him to the Toon Army.

programme.title: Classic Match - NEW v MCI
programme.desc: NEW v MCI - We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2018/2019 season.

programme.title: REWIND - EP19: LES FERDINAND - NEWCASTLE RUN IN 95/96
programme.desc: EP19: LES FERDINAND - NEWCASTLE RUN IN 95/96 - Still the only team in Premier League history to throw away a 12-point lead, Les Ferdinand tells the story of Newcastle’s agonising Run-In, where Kevin Keegan’s side were pipped to the title by Manchester United.

programme.title: REWIND - EP15: SHAY GIVEN: MY NEWCASTLE YEARS
programme.desc: EP15: SHAY GIVEN: MY NEWCASTLE YEARS - Renowned for his lightning-fast reflexes and unwavering courage, Shay Given is one of the Premier League’s all-time greatest goalkeepers. The Irishman reflects on his most memorable moments between the posts as Newcastle’s number one.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP15: EDWIN VAN DER SAR
programme.desc: EP15: EDWIN VAN DER SAR - Edwin van der Sar has faced down pressure on the biggest stages in world football, but his toughest battle came after retirement. In 2023, the legendary goalkeeper suffered a life-threatening brain haemorrhage. In this episode Edwin opens up on his recovery and looks back on his career at the top that redefined goalkeeping. From Champions League glory with Ajax and Manchester United to his commanding presence in the Premier League, Van der Sar was the calm at the heart of some of football’s greatest teams. We also explore his post-playing career as a respected executive, his role in Ajax’s modern renaissance, and how his recent health scare has reshaped his outlook on life.

programme.title: Classic Match - MUN v EVE
programme.desc: MUN v EVE - We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2011/2012 season.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP03: WAYNE ROONEY HALL OF FAME SPECIAL
programme.desc: EP03: WAYNE ROONEY HALL OF FAME SPECIAL - With 208 goals in 491 top flight appearances, Wayne Rooney is widely regarded as one of the best strikers to have played in the League. We sit down with the Englishman to discuss the moments that made him a legend and helped him rightly earn his place in the Premier League Hall of Fame.

programme.title: LIVE Studio: PL MOMENTS - EP09: THIERRY HENRY'S TOP 10 PL MOMENTS
programme.desc: EP09: THIERRY HENRY'S TOP 10 PL MOMENTS - Arguably the greatest striker the Premier League has ever seen, Thierry Henry sits down with Will Perry to reveal his Top 10 Premier League Moments.

programme.title: REWIND - EP19: LES FERDINAND - NEWCASTLE RUN IN 95/96
programme.desc: EP19: LES FERDINAND - NEWCASTLE RUN IN 95/96 - Still the only team in Premier League history to throw away a 12-point lead, Les Ferdinand tells the story of Newcastle’s agonising Run-In, where Kevin Keegan’s side were pipped to the title by Manchester United.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP06: THE ENTERTAINERS
programme.desc: EP06: THE ENTERTAINERS - Nicknamed ‘The Entertainers’, Kevin Keegan’s Newcastle team of the 1995-96 season set the Premier League alight with their confidence and flair that took them agonisingly close to winning their first Premier League title. In this show, we speak to those that were part of that incredible journey and reflect on some of those unforgettable moments that captured hearts and forever changing the club's legacy.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP18: THE INVINCIBLES

With contributions from Thierry Henry, Patrick Vieira, Dennis Bergkamp, Freddie Ljungberg, Ray Parlour and Martin Keown.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP24: HALL OF FAME EVENT NIGHT
programme.desc: EP24: HALL OF FAME EVENT NIGHT - We head to London to unveil the two newest inductee’s into the Premier League Hall of fame. Hosted by Kelly Cates, and with a who’s who of footballing royalty in attendance, we go behind the curtain to give you exclusive access to the hottest ticket in town.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP18: BOURNEMOUTH - FROM THE BRINK
programme.desc: EP18: BOURNEMOUTH - FROM THE BRINK - In 2024/25, AFC Bournemouth smashed their club record with 56 Premier League points, but less than 20 years earlier, they were drowning in debt and fighting for survival. This is the story of a club that defied the odds, silenced the doubters, and rose to become a certified Premier League contender, with their eyes set on Europe.

programme.title: LIVE Studio: PL MOMENTS - EP07: BOURNEMOUTH
programme.desc: EP07: BOURNEMOUTH - Matt Richie and Charlie Daniels are the guests for a special edition of PL Moments which discusses Bournemouth’s rise from administration to the Premier League.

programme.title: Classic Match - BOU v WHU
programme.desc: BOU v WHU - We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2017/2018 season.

programme.desc: 2017/2018 (GB: SALAH) - We take a look back at some of the most spectacular and important goals from previous Premier League seasons.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP10: EMMANUEL ADEBAYOR
programme.desc: EP10: EMMANUEL ADEBAYOR - With 97 Premier League goals for some of the biggest clubs in English football, Emmanuel Adebayor was one of Africa’s finest footballers to play on these shores. Now, through his SEA Foundation, Adebayor is making a significant impact off the pitch, providing inspiration and opportunity for people in Togo and across the continent. This week, in support of the Premier League’s No Room For Racism Campaign, The Big Interview sits down with the former African footballer of the year to discuss his challenges in early life, his colourful career, his charitable work around the globe and the influence and importance of different cultures in the Premier League.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP09: CODY GAKPO
programme.desc: EP09: CODY GAKPO - Since joining Liverpool in 2023, Cody Gakpo has become a key figure at Anfield ? playing a major role in their Premier League title win last season. This week, The Big Interview sits down with the Netherlands international to learn about his rise, at the PSV academy from the age of six, to winning one of football’s biggest prizes. Gakpo also reflects on his upbringing, the role of faith in his journey, learning about his roots in Togo and his changing role in Arne Slot’s vision for Liverpool as they look to secure a 21st league title.

programme.desc: EP25: SOL CAMPBELL - THE MOVE THAT SHOOK NORTH LONDON - Ahead of the first North London derby of the season, we sit down with the man who made one of most controversial transfers in World football; Sol Campbell. programme.title: Review of the Season - 2024/2025 (LIV)
programme.desc: 2024/2025 (LIV) - Relive another extraordinary Premier League campaign as Liverpool soared to an historic 20th league title, Nottingham Forest defied expectations and the promoted sides were strenuously challenged. There were also tactical transformations, shifts in narrative trends, and a more open field than ever before. Review of the Season documents all of the thrilling stories to emerge across the 380 matches.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP04: MICKY VAN DE VEN
programme.desc: EP04: MICKY VAN DE VEN - After just one year of top flight football, Micky van de Ven signed for Tottenham Hotspur ? quickly establishing himself as a key figure in Spurs’ Europa League winning side, his iconic clearance playing a crucial part in securing the club a first major trophy for 17 years. In this week’s Big Interview, we discuss his rise from the Dutch second division, to the Bundesliga with Wolfsburg before making the move to the Premier League. Van de Ven opens up about life in London, the importance of his family and friends and his hopes for the future in North London.

programme.desc: A story from the age of valiant knights, beautiful princesses, and evil sorcerers. Ruslan, an artist who dreams of becoming a knight, meets and falls in love with the beautiful Mila, without realizing that she is the King's daughter.

programme.title: Flow (2024)
programme.desc: Cat is a solitary animal, but as its home is devastated by a great flood, he finds refuge on a boat populated by various species, and will have to team up with them despite their differences.

programme.title: Inspector Sun and the Curse of the Black Widow (2022)
programme.desc: Set in the world of bugs where spiders are the cops, a detective boards a seaplane to San Francisco after finally capturing his arch nemesis, but a murder on his flight draws him into a plot that threatens both the human and bug worlds.

programme.title: Steal the Naughty List (2024)
programme.desc: A group of Arctic characters embark on a perilous adventure across the frozen tundra, facing avalanches, blizzards, and wolves, to steal the naughty list from Saint Nicholas.

programme.title: ADVENTURES WITH NIKKY
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in great adventures with your friend Nikky and see what fun things the whole world has to offer!

programme.title: Groundhog Dave 2 (2020)
programme.desc: Its almost springtime, and the whole town eagerly awaits Groundhog Daves annual end-of-winter presentation - but this year, Daves had a startling premonition that foretells the end of the world.

programme.title: Ribbit (2014)
programme.desc: A frog with an identity crisis embarks on a journey to discover his true self while meeting new faces along the way.

programme.title: NIKKYS FAIRY TALE
programme.desc: Embark on a magical journey through mesmerizing worlds and stories, where the extraordinary becomes reality! Witness the paths of kings and queens, stunning princesses, and brave knights together with Nikky!

programme.title: Boonie Bears: Entangled Worlds (2017)
programme.desc: Boonie bears and Bald Qiang work together with secret primitive girl to smash a conspiracy to destroy old-growth forest.

programme.title: The Nut Job (2014)
programme.desc: An incorrigibly self-serving exiled squirrel finds himself helping his former park brethren survive by raiding a nut store, a location that also happens to be a front for a human gang's bank robbery.

programme.title: Tad: The Lost Explorer (2012)
programme.desc: Construction worker Tad wants to be a famous archaeologist. He gets a chance to look for a lost Inca city in Peru, where the gold was hidden. He meets the professor's cute daughter/assistant. Villains chase them.

programme.title: Steal the Naughty List (2024)
programme.desc: A group of Arctic characters embark on a perilous adventure across the frozen tundra, facing avalanches, blizzards, and wolves, to steal the naughty list from Saint Nicholas.

programme.title: AINBO: Spirit of the Amazon (2021)
programme.desc: An epic journey of a young hero and her Spirit Guides, "Dillo" a cute and humorous armadillo and "Vaca" a goofy oversized tapir, who embark on a quest to save their home in the spectacular Amazon Rainforest.

programme.title: A Stork's Journey 2 (2023)
programme.desc: While wintering on a large lake in North Africa, Richard learns that this time he will not be entrusted with such an honorable and responsible task as leading the flight.

programme.title: Inspector Sun and the Curse of the Black Widow (2022)
programme.desc: Set in the world of bugs where spiders are the cops, a detective boards a seaplane to San Francisco after finally capturing his arch nemesis, but a murder on his flight draws him into a plot that threatens both the human and bug worlds.

programme.title: Stick Man (2015)
programme.desc: Stick Man lives in the family tree with his Stick Lady Love and their stick children three, and he's heading on an epic adventure across the seasons. Will he get back to his family in time for Christmas?

programme.title: ADVENTURES WITH NIKKY
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in great adventures with your friend Nikky and see what fun things the whole world has to offer!

programme.title: Dreambuilders (2020)
programme.desc: Minna, a young girl, misuses her newfound ability to create and control other people's dreams to teach her bothersome stepsister a lesson.

programme.title: The Inseparables (2023)
programme.desc: A runaway puppet with boundless imagination and an abandoned stuffed animal toy in need of a friend cross paths in Central Park and pair up against all odds for an epic adventure of friendship in New York City.

programme.title: NIKKYS FAIRY TALE
programme.desc: Embark on a magical journey through mesmerizing worlds and stories, where the extraordinary becomes reality! Witness the paths of kings and queens, stunning princesses, and brave knights together with Nikky!

programme.title: Little Brother, Big Trouble: A Christmas Adventure (2012)
programme.desc: Set right before Christmas, Niko the reindeer must deal with his mom getting re-married and his being tasked with looking after his little stepbrother.

programme.title: Norm of the North: King Sized Adventure (2019)
programme.desc: An ancient Chinese artifact has been stolen by a villainous archaeologist named Dexter. With the help of his Lemming friends, Norm must keep his word and embark on a journey across the world to help recover the artifact for the people of China.

programme.title: Moonbound (2021)
programme.desc: A young boy embarks on an intergalactic mission to save his little sister from the clutches of a vengeful man on the moon.

programme.title: Space Dogs: Tropical Adventure (2020)
programme.desc: When a mysterious and dangerous whirlpool appears in the tropics of the Atlantic Ocean, astronauts Belka and Strelka are sent to investigate. With the help of their good friends, Belka and Strelka must once again act heroically and complete a daring mission to save the planet along with the distant home of their new alien friends.

programme.title: Boonie Bears: The Wild Life (2020)
programme.desc: Genetics have never been so hilarious. A thrilling new place opens on Pine Tree Mountain, "Wild Land", that offers a legendary experience. By wearing a gene-altering bracelet, guests can transform themselves into a variety of animals. Vick discovers that Wild life is hosting a competition with a massive grand prize and decides to enter. He teams up with Bramble and a mysterious man named Leon, astonishingly winning the tournament. Soon afterwards, Leon is caught trying to secretly copy the park data by the owner, Tom, and Vick discovers that hybrid guests are going feral and attacking others - Who is the mysterious Leon? Is Tom the mastermind Vick has to fight?

programme.title: Dogtanian and the Three Muskehounds (2021)
programme.desc: Dogtanian is a young swordsman who dreams of joining the legendary Muskehounds. After proving his skills and earning their trust, he and the Muskehounds must defend the King from the evil Cardinal Richelieu's secret plot to seize power.

programme.title: Just Super (2022)
programme.desc: You don't have to be a superhero to be super. Hedvig has shrunk daddy's superhero-costume so now he can no longer be the super-Lion. The gamer Hedvig is clumsy, but when dad chooses cousin Adrian to be the next hero, Hedvig has to react.

programme.title: Ozzy (2016)
programme.desc: When his family goes on vacation, a young dog finds himself at a dog prison where he must escape with the help of his new friends.

programme.title: ADVENTURES WITH NIKKY
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in great adventures with your friend Nikky and see what fun things the whole world has to offer!

programme.title: Gulliver Returns (2021)
programme.desc: The legendary Gulliver returns to the Kingdom of Lilliput, but he is not the giant they remember.

programme.title: Thunder and the House of Magic (2013)
programme.desc: Thunder, an abandoned young cat seeking shelter from a storm, stumbles into the strangest house imaginable, owned by an old magician and inhabited by a dazzling array of automatons and gizmos.

programme.title: NIKKYS FAIRY TALE

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions’ is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. programme.title: Repco Supercars Highlights
programme.desc: Sandown 5 - Day 1 - Highlights

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir
Play School: Let The Music Play
Thomas And Friends: All Engines Go
Play School: Let's Take A Ride
BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Hiccupism / Silence please - Barbabeau can't paint. He has a hiccup he can't get rid of. Just when he's about to give up, he accidentally creates a new artistic movement. // Barbalib wants to compete in a writing contest but his brothers and sisters stop her from concentrating.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Double Booked / Bogweed / Prizes - Tim tries to be at two parties at once. // Tim tries to find a bogweed free snack for Kai. // After losing again and again, Tia tries to win every party game.

programme.title: DORA
programme.desc: Wonky Wishing Wand / Bip Bip's Big Show - Big Red Chicken's magic goes wonky and not only shrinks himself, but causes wacky things to happen throughout the rainforest. Dora has to fix it! // Bip Bip has a concert with Tico, but he's lost! Dora and Boots have to get him to the show on time.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Boingies! - When a bunch of adorable critters called Boingies get lost in Axle City, it's up to Blaze and AJ to gather them up and get them home safe and sound.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: The Fuchsia Ocean / Zero Waste - Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Pups Save a Goldrush / Pups Save the Paw Patroller - When a grizzled old prospector discovers gold in Adventure Bay, it’s a bona fide, dog gone, gold rush! // When Mayor Humdinger and the Kit-tastrophe Crew try to steal the Paw Patroller, the chase becomes a rescue!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Pups Take in a Runaway Kitty - Rocky Kitty runs away to join the Paw Patrol, he becomes a hero when he helps rescue Humdinger and the kitties.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: The Crew Builds A School / The Crew Builds A Waterway - It's the first day of school in Builder Cove... if Rubble & Crew can finish the building in time! / The pups need a construction solution to save Farmer Zoe's crops and to keep Crunchy the beaver from taking all the water!

programme.title: DORA
programme.desc: Abuela’s Quinceañera / Story Time - Dora finds out that her Abuela never had a quinceańera and throws her a super-secret surprise party with a special dress, tiara, and shoes! // Dora's friend Coco doesn't have a story for Story Time, so they go to the Tall Tale Tree in search of one!

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Double Dare You / Roy - On a ski trip, the Barbapapas build a giant igloo. Barbabravo and Barbalib challenge each other to find out who is braver. // Barbabright creates a vacuuming robot that's also very good at soccer. The Barbababies organise a match against the robots.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: We Need To Save The Corals - Barbapapa decides to tell the barbababies about the time he went to explore the Arctic and the seabed.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Explorer / Happy Parky / Storm - Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone. // Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever. // When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: Space Mission Blaze - When three of Blaze's friends get launched into outer space on out-of-control jetpacks, Astronauts Blaze and AJ must blast off to save them!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Pups Save a Jukebox / Pups Save a Mayor on a Wire - Mayor Humdinger steals a jukebox so he can play an annoying song all day long. Chase and Rubble track it down to save the records. // A hungry eagle causes Mayor Goodway's tightrope walking lesson to go awry sending her careening down Jake's Mountain

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Pups Save the Baby Space Rocks / Pups Save the Eddies and Emmys - When a mysterious storm drops hailstones that hatch into Baby Space Rocks, the Pups must find a way to keep them safe. // A 3-D printer leads to trouble when Eddie and Emmy make 3-D reproductions of themselves and play pranks all over Adventure Bay.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: The Crew Builds A Playground / The Crew Fixes A Roof - After Speed Meister builds an unsafe playground, the Rubble & Crew get creative and build a whole new one with old materials. // The town Chili Cookaroo is threatened when City Hall's roof starts to cave in! Luckily, the pups know just how to fix it.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: The Crew Builds A Car Wash / The Crew Plans Grandpa Day - Mayor Greatway needs her muddy motorcycle cleaned fast! Wheeler and the pups jump into action to build a solution before the big race. // It's Grandpa Gravel's special day! But when the pups are needed, they have to change their Grandpa Day plans.

programme.title: DORA
programme.desc: Dora's Birthday Surprise / Moonlight Fiesta - Dora and Boots find Dora's lost birthday cake and the family throws her a surprise birthday party! // Dora and Boots help La Luna find the Luna Lily so everyone can enjoy the Moonlight Fiesta.

programme.title: Baby Shark's Big Show!
programme.desc: Doctor Drama / The White Whale - After injuring his fin, Hank is afraid to go to the doctor. // Baby and William search high and low for the most delicious flownuts in the ocean.

programme.title: Baby Shark's Big Show!
programme.desc: Sherman in the Middle / Smoothie Day - Hank becomes frustrated when he has to share his father's time with his new stepsisters. // As the squiddos prepare for Smoothie Day, William makes a new friend whose jokes are more hurtful than funny.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Freddy Fox - Peppa and her friends are playing hide and seek, but it is Freddy Fox with his super smelling nose who is the best at playing that game.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Whistling - Peppa tries to learn how to whistle after she realizes that seemingly everyone but her can do it.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Doctor Hamster's Tortoise - Doctor Hamster the vet comes to Peppa's playgroup to show the children her pets. But Tiddles has run away. But Ms. Rabbit is going to rescue Tiddles.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Sun, Sea and Snow - Peppa and her friends and family are looking forward to a trip to the beach where they can make sandcastles, but when they arrive at the beach there is too much snow!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig's Computer - Mummy Pig gives her old PC to Granny and Grandpa Pig. Will they be able to use it?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Hospital - Peppa and her playgroup friends go with Madame Gazelle to visit Pedro Pony, who is in hospital with a broken leg.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Spring - Grandpa Pig organises a chocolate egg hunt for Peppa and her friends. Will the piglets track down the treats?

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Summer Camp I / Summer Camp II - Barbapapa and Barbamama have announced to their dear barbababies that they are going on a trip to Easter Island. // The Barbababies, the twins, and Mr. Strict set sail on "Thésée", a magnificent sailboat.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Dreams And Illusions / Dreaming Apprentices - While everyone sleeps peacefully, one may wonder what the Barbababies could be dreaming about. // To dream makes you grow... But what can Barbidur, Barbalala, Barbotine and Barbidou possibly dream of?

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: The Crew Builds A Train Station / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Sign - Rubble & Crew build the first train station in Builder Cove just in time to welcome Farmer Zoe's new cow Mooreen. // Popstar Sierra Sparkle is moving to Builder Cove! But when the pups plan a surprise greeting, Speed Meister makes a plan of his own.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: The Crew Builds A Mini Golf Course/The Crew Builds A Butterfly Garden - When a family of bunnies hops onto the soccer field, Rubble & Crew use their skills to build a new sport... Bunny Ball! // After the pups discover a new kind of butterfly, it flutters away! Will a giant butterfly garden help bring it back?

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Pups Save the Kitty Rescue Crew / Pups Save an Ostrich - Mayor Humdinger makes fake emergencies for his kitties to save so they appear better then the PAW Patrol. // The Wingnuts get a new pet ostrich, but it gets lost on the trip home. The PAW Patrol must find and lead it to the Wingnuts' ranch.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Pups Save the Buggy Trekkers - Mayor Humdinger squeezes himself into the Trekkers' dune buggy race, while his cheating ways put the other racers in jeopardy.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Innovation Melting Pot / Make Up Your Mind Barbazoo - The Barbababies want to invent like Leonardo da Vinci. // The Barbababies must choose between going to the pool or going for a bike ride.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Hiccupism - Barbabeau can't paint. He has a hiccup he can't get rid of. Just when he's about to give up, he accidentally creates a new artistic movement.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Shooting Star / Ball / Balloon - Tim, Tommy, Tia and Dad get stuck on a remote asteroid. // Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mum's bedroom. // Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: The Crew Builds Charger A Super Bed / The Crew Builds A Super Squirrely Whirly Playground - Charger has a problem... he's got too much energy to sleep! Lucky for him, Rubble & Crew knows there's always a construction solution. // Rubble and the pups build Mix, Motor, Lucas, and Lily the coolest Super Squirrely Whirly playdate ever!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: The Crew Builds A Chicken Feeder - The Crew build a feeder for Farmer Zoe's chickens, but when they get loose, it's up to the pups to safely rescue them.

programme.title: DORA
programme.desc: Big Big Boots / Backpack's Sticky Situation - Boots is too short to go on a ride, so he wishes to be bigger and becomes giant! Dora helps him go back to his normal size. // Backpack has something special for Dora, but she can't open! They travel to Abuela on Tallest Mountain so she can fix her.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: Space Mission Blaze - When three of Blaze's friends get launched into outer space on out-of-control jetpacks, Astronauts Blaze and AJ must blast off to save them!

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Where Did It Go Barbabravo? / The Big Bad Hen - Like a secret agent, Barbabravo leads the investigation equipped with his gadgets to find out who stole Barbapapa's cake. // Barbalala is convinced she heard a giant hen prowling around the house. The Barbababies organize themselves to stand guard.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Clock and Dance / Barbapileup - The barbababies prepare a show for Barbamama's birthday. While Barbalala finishes up, they go to the carnival where Barbabeau gets stuck in an attraction. // Three separate stories telescope into a big final bouquet in the middle of the courtyard.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Toy / Astrofools / Mole - Tim does all he can to get the new DinoStar toy. // It's a day for practical jokes, but Tim doesn't know when to stop. // Tim and Dad have to catch a troublesome mole.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Pups Save the Soccer Game / Pups Save a Lucky Collar - Mayor Humdinger challenges the Adventure Bay team to a soccer match, and Ryder and the Paw Patrol are called in to play. // The Paw Patrol must work as a team to overcome some dirty tricks by Mayor Humdinger and pull out a victory!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Pups Save a Runaway Robo-Chicken Purse - Digi and Tal's inventions to help a busy Mayor Goodway go haywire

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: The Crew Builds An Observatory / The Crew Builds A Zipline - The pups jump into action to build an observatory to help their friend River get a cool picture of a shooting star! // After meeting Park Ranger Rose, the pups get stuck on a nature trail. But Rubble & Crew, finds a construction solution.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The Boat Pond - Peppa and her family and friends are playing at the pond with their toy boats. Everyone has a boat to play with except Rebecca Rabbit. Daddy Pig makes Rebecca a boat out of newspaper. Rebecca’s paper boat is so nice; everyone wants one.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa at the Playground - Grandpa Pig takes Peppa and George to the playground, but does not understand the children's rules.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Goldie the Fish - Goldie the fish does not look happy and is not eating her food, so Peppa, George and Mummy Pig take her on a bus trip to visit Dr Hamster the vet.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Fun Fair - The family go to the funfair, but Mummy Pig is angry when people at the fair tell her that she will not be able to win prizes in the competitions, just like George is sad because the mini golf course is too big for him.

programme.desc: Numbers - Peppa and her friends learn how to count by playing games at Madame Gazelle's daycare.

programme.desc: The Crew & Marshall Build A Fire Station - Rubble & Crew build Builder Cove's first ever Fire Station, complete with an inspection from Paw Patrol's Marshall! But when Speed Meister's sneaky sabotage traps Marshall's Fire Truck, the pups work together to put out a fire construction-style.

programme.title: DORA
programme.desc: A Dog For Dora / Super Pozole - Dora gets a new puppy that makes her cat Lucky jealous. After he runs away, Dora tracks Lucky down to remind him of how loved he is. / Today is the championship game, but all of Dora's friends have a cold. Dora helps them feel better in time to play!

programme.title: Baby Shark's Big Show!
programme.desc: Fishy Force / Superhero Training Day - Vola, Goldie, Chucks, and Hank feel left out when they learn that Baby and William have been keeping a super secret. // To prepare for their first big TV interview, Fishy Force trains to be just like their favorite comic book heroes.

programme.title: Baby Shark's Big Show!
programme.desc: Findependence Day / Costello Quits - Fishy Force takes on a villain who steals all the treats in Carnivore Cove. // When Costello quits, Vigo sets out to be a supervillain without his henchfishy.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The Flying Vet - Doctor Hamster is rushed off her feet when nearly all the animals need her help on the same day.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Kylie Kangeroo - Peppa and George meet Kylie Kangaroo and her brother Joey. Peppa shows Kylie how to jump up and down in muddy puddles, but who can jump the highest?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Captain Daddy Dog - Mummy Dog and Danny are very excited! Captain Daddy Dog is home from the sea, and he's bearing gifts! What can they be?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grampy Rabbit's Dinosaur Park - To celebrate Freddy Fox's birthday, the children go on a trip to a Dinosaur Park. With Grampy Rabbit as their leader, they follow dinosaur footprints to find Freddy's birthday treat.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Bedtime Story - Daddy Pig reads Peppa and George a bedtime story. Later George wakes up again, so Peppa has to make up another story.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Lost Keys - After a family trip to a mountain beauty spot, Daddy Pig loses the car keys down a very deep drain.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: George's New Dinosaur - When his favorite toy dinosaur loses its tail, George visits Mr Fox's Shop to find a new one.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: One Last For The Road / The Little Critters - The Barbababies love bedtime stories, except if they are always the same... // Barbabelle had a restless night because of all the insects!

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Barbazoo's Diary / The Great Reporter - Barbazoo have plenty of things to write about in his diary! // After reading the biography of Nellie Bly, Barbalib is determined to become a Great Reporter!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: The Crew Builds A Smoothie Shop / The Crew Builds A Dino Roof Party - Café Carl opens up a smoothie shop on the boardwalk! But when the coaster causes coconut chaos, Rubble & Crew know just what to do. // Rubble & Crew work together to find a construction solution when Charger's bouncy birthday surprise needs a lift!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: The Crew Builds A Ferris Wheel / The Crew Builds A Farm Animal Yoga Space - Rubble & Crew want to give Grocer Gabriel the best beach day ever... including a ride on a brand new Ferris wheel at the boardwalk! // When Farmer Zoe's animals need some relaxation, the pups build a perfect place to practice yoga with Coach Karima.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Pups Save an Extreme Lunch / Pups Save a Cat Burglar - Daring Danny X is performing a new stunt! He is harnessed over a canyon eating an Extreme Lunch when the wind blows him upside down! // It's Pie Swap Day! Humdinger sends Rocky Kitty to take one of Mr. Porter's tasty pies, so he can join the contest.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Pups Save a Capybara - The Paw Patrol rescues Winnie and a capybara when they go rolling off in a giant exercise ball.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Vandal! / Tumbles, Where Did You Go? - Barbidur catches a mysterious masked vandal. // Tototutu, Barbidur's favorite little car, has mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: The Big Bad Hen - Barbalala is convinced she heard a giant hen prowling around the house. The Barbababies organize themselves to stand guard.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Boots / Moon Parrot / Tailball - Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control. // Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot. // Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: The Crew And Skye Build A Mountain Lodge - Skye visits Rubble & Crew from Adventure Bay when their construction project needs some aerial support. But when Speed Meister tries to beat the pups to finish the job, Skye, Rubble, and the rest of the crew jump into rescue mode to save the day!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: The Crew Builds A Train Station - Rubble & Crew build the first train station in Builder Cove just in time to welcome Farmer Zoe's new cow Mooreen.

programme.title: Icelandic Formula Offroad 2024 - Egilsstadir, Round 2
programme.desc: Egilsstadir, Round 2 - The Icelandic Formula Off-Road is one of the most extreme racing series in the world and demands everything from the teams and their specially built vehicles. Nearly vertical cliffs have to be climbed, demanding time challenges have to be solved or spectacular aquaplaning stunts have to be performed.

programme.title: FIA European Truck Racing Series 2025 - Le Mans Bugatti, France
programme.desc: Le Mans Bugatti, France - The FIA European Truck Racing Championship is the biggest, most imposing racing series in the world. The racing trucks are equipped with 1200 hp engines doing up to 100 miles per hour. On a grid with 26 big rigs the 5.5-ton machines doing battle there’s guaranteed action-packed lights-to-flag racing galore.

programme.title: EMX Quad European Championship 2025 - Gdansk, Poland
programme.desc: Gdansk, Poland - The 2025 European Motocross Championship is the 37th European Motocross Championship season since it was revived in 1988. It includes 16 events and 6 different classes. It will start in Spain on 16 March and will end in Turkey on 7 September. All rounds will act as support classes at the European rounds of the 2025 MXGP.

programme.title: All Wheel Drive Safari Challenge 2025 - Round 1, Walters Arena
programme.desc: Round 1, Walters Arena - The "AWDC" is a british offorad event where drivers have to tackle tight and twisty roads filled with mud und gravel

programme.title: Ferrari Challenge Europe 2025 - Circuit de Barcelona-Catalunya, Montmelo, Spain
programme.desc: Circuit de Barcelona-Catalunya, Montmelo, Spain - The "Ferrari Challenge Europe" is an one-make series for Ferraris with seven races across Europe

programme.title: DTM 2025 - Season Review
programme.desc: Season Review - The Deutsche Tourenwagen Masters (DTM) thrills with close GT3 racing, featuring top drivers and teams competing on iconic circuits across Germany and Europe. High-octane motorsport at its finest.

programme.title: Michelin Le Mans Cup 2025 - Autódromo Internacional do Algarve, Portugal
programme.desc: Autódromo Internacional do Algarve, Portugal - The "Le Mans Cup" is an european multiclass championship for LMP3 & GT-cars and also known as the second devision to the ELMS

programme.title: European Le Mans Series 2025 - Autódromo Internacional do Algarve, Portugal
programme.desc: Autódromo Internacional do Algarve, Portugal - The European Le Mans Series is a multiclass endurance championship with several races across Europe

programme.title: GT World Challenge America 2025 - Indianapolis Motor Speedway
programme.desc: Indianapolis Motor Speedway - GT World Challenge America is the premier North American GT series. Taking place on the best US circuits form Sonoma to Indianapolis, each of the seven race weekends features 90-min double-header races.

programme.title: GT World Challenge Europe 2025 - Misano World Circuit, Italy
programme.desc: Misano World Circuit, Italy - The GT World Challenge Europe is back for another season. The schedule consists of 10 rounds at high-level circuits, split evenly between the Endurance Cup and Sprint Cup. And once again, the calendar features the Total 24 Hours of Spa as the marquee event.

programme.title: NASCAR Whelen Euro Series 2025 - Semi Final GP Germany, Motorsport Arena Oschersleben
programme.desc: Semi Final GP Germany, Motorsport Arena Oschersleben - NASCAR, America’s most popular racing series, is now well established in Europe and there is no better proof than its European division: the NASCAR Whelen Euro Series. This year, 16 teams from nine different countries with a total of 24 cars prove once again that the NWES with its pure racing character is one of the best touring car series on the old continent. Motorvision.TV shows highlights from every race weekend.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes - The Examination
programme.desc: The Examination - This is what it looks like when the Stunt Heroes from Action Concept perform a long jump: A vehicle jumps at full speed over four cars, which explode one after the other. It’s a matter of precision and timing. Up-and-coming stuntwoman Tina has to prove, what she can do. It’s a spectacular, action-packed stunt with guaranteed bruising!

programme.title: Made in... - BMW Series 5 GT, Part 2
programme.desc: BMW Series 5 GT, Part 2 - The automotive industry is a brutal business and the genesis of new models is a jealousy kept secret. However, Made In was able to document the production history of a new BMW model. After a design competition eight models are shortlisted and presented to 500 test customers. A jury recommends two models for the finale and then the winner of the design contest will be announced and produced.

programme.title: Top Ten Show - The Best-Loved Off-Roaders
programme.desc: The Best-Loved Off-Roaders - At the moment, the industry considers the SUV, Crossover or SAC to be good choices. But is it such a good idea to drive off road with a Porsche Cayenne or BMW 6X? Today, we look at the real off road monsters.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes - Highfall
programme.desc: Highfall - While most people never had a car crash, they know spectacular car crashes with huge explosions from movies. But these scenes are much more sensational than in real life, because cars hardly ever explode. The Stunt Heroes reveal how these stunts are prepared and which tricks are needed, when you have to soften a car or jump from a high-rise building.

programme.title: Made in... - Volkner Mobile
programme.desc: Volkner Mobile - With its length of up to 12 meters and its weight of 18 tons, the Performance by Volkner is the most extraordinary luxury motor home from Germany and one of the most exclusive carvans in the world. What makes it so exceptional is the garage between its axes. This system is patented and unique in the field of motor homes. The heads behind this vehicle are Gerhard Volkner and his wife Stephanie.

programme.desc: Episode 33 - This show brings you the best mix of national and international powersports from around the world.

programme.title: DTM 2025 - Nürburgring, Germany
programme.desc: Nürburgring, Germany - The Deutsche Tourenwagen Masters (DTM) thrills with close GT3 racing, featuring top drivers and teams competing on iconic circuits across Germany and Europe. High-octane motorsport at its finest.

programme.title: Belgian Rally Championship 2025 - Omloop van Vlaanderen
programme.desc: Omloop van Vlaanderen - The "BRC" is a belgian rally championship where drivers of modern rally cars compete against each other on gravel and tarmac

programme.title: British Rally Championship 2025 - East Riding Stages Rally, Beverley
programme.desc: East Riding Stages Rally, Beverley - The British Rally Championship brings edge-of-the-seat rally action across the UK, tackling gravel and asphalt stages with plenty of professional drivers vying for glory. Adrenaline-fueled competition at its core.

programme.title: TER Series 2025 - Algola National Rally, South Africa
programme.desc: Algola National Rally, South Africa - The TER World Series typically consists of several rounds held on various tarmac surfaces across Europe. It attracts both professional and amateur rally drivers competing in different classes. The championship provides a platform for drivers and teams to showcase their skills and compete for the title against competitors from around the world.

programme.title: Africa Eco Race 2025 - Stage 8 & 9, Amodjar-Amodjar / Amodjar-Amodjar ''René Metge''
programme.desc: Stage 8 & 9, Amodjar-Amodjar / Amodjar-Amodjar ''René Metge'' - The Africa Eco Race takes adventurers through Africa’s deserts and wilderness, testing endurance and navigation in a grueling rally-raid from Morocco to Dakar. Epic motorsport moments await.

programme.title: UK Rally Show 2024 - Episode 7
programme.desc: Episode 7 - The brand-new UK Rally Show, brought to you by specialist producer Special Stage, is a monthly magazine show bringing you some of the best rally action from around the UK.

programme.title: BTRDA Rallycross 2025 - Round 1, Blyton Park
programme.desc: Round 1, Blyton Park - BTRDA is an UK-based rallycross championship where drivers compete against each other in sprint races

programme.title: Stunt Heroes - Behind the Scene
programme.desc: Behind the Scene - The Stunt Heroes from Action Concept are tough professionals. They jump from houses and make cars fly or explode. On this episode reporter Dean Malay takes a look behind the scenes of the stunt company and lures out the real people behind the Stunt Heroes’ hard shells. Coordinator Domi explains the workflow at Action Concept and reveals why stuntman Tobi is called Heidi.

programme.title: Made in... - PG Bikes
programme.desc: PG Bikes - A plain, industrial building in the Bavarian town of Regensburg. It's the home of the most innovative German bike workshop: PG Bikes. Regensburg develops and produces electric bikes, with retro-appearance.

programme.title: Fastzone 2025 - Episode 34
programme.desc: Episode 34 - This show brings you the best mix of national and international powersports from around the world.

programme.title: Australian Superbike Championship 2024 - Junior, Phillip Island, Victoria
programme.desc: Junior, Phillip Island, Victoria - The "ASBK" is an australian motorcycle championship with up to seven events per season

programme.title: FIM Supermoto World and European Championship 2025 - GP Germany, St Wendel
programme.desc: GP Germany, St Wendel - The 2025 season kicks off on Albaida circuit, Spain. Continuing for the fourth year in a row in Sardegna’s, Tramatza track (Italy) following by S1GP of Germany in St Wendel. From there the action heads to Hungary, new entry of 2025, on Visonta circuit where works will soon begin on the new off-road section and the new sky section. The series shifts to the historic Busca circuit in early September for Grand Prix of Piemonte, then for the first time ever the FIM SuperMoto of Nations will be host in Czech Republic and as is now customary, the Championship ends on October 13th in the famed street circuit of Mettet.

programme.title: FIM Enduro World Championship 2025 - Grand Prix of Wales, Rhayader
programme.desc: Grand Prix of Wales, Rhayader - The FIM EnduroGP World Championship delivers thrilling off-road action, with top riders battling on challenging courses with natural obstacles. A packed schedule showcases skill and excitement.

programme.title: FIM Superenduro World Championship 2024 - Grand Prix of Hungary, Budapest
programme.desc: Grand Prix of Hungary, Budapest - The FIM SuperEnduro World Championship is an international off-road motorcycle racing series that focuses on endurocross-style racing. In SuperEnduro events, riders compete on a closed course that features a combination of obstacles such as rocks, logs, and tight turns, often indoors or in arena settings.

programme.title: FIM Sidecarcross World Championship 2024 - Season Review Documentary
programme.desc: Season Review Documentary - The FIM Sidecarcross World Championship is an international motocross racing series featuring sidecar motorcycles. In this championship, a rider and a passenger (the "passenger" often referred to as the "passenger" or "monkey") work together to navigate challenging off-road tracks. The championship typically consists of multiple rounds held at various locations around the world.

programme.title: FIM World Motocross Championship 2024 - MXGP of Flanders, Lommel
programme.desc: MXGP of Flanders, Lommel - The FIM Motocross World Championship - also known as the MXGP - is the premier championship of motocross racing.

programme.title: FIM X-Trial World Championship 2025 - Grand Prix of France, Chambery
programme.desc: Grand Prix of France, Chambery - The FIM X-Trial World Championship is an international indoor motorcycle trials championship that features some of the best riders in the world competing in highly technical and challenging obstacle courses. In X-Trial events, riders navigate through a series of sections that include obstacles such as rocks, logs, and other challenging terrain, aiming to complete the course with the fewest penalties.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes - The First Time
programme.desc: The First Time - The Stunt Heroes from the Action Concept are shooting a car rollover. But stunt coordinator Carl wants to go the whole hog. His motto: if you’re going to do something at all, you might as well do it properly! Thus, he throws an exciting shootout into the mix. He also has a surprise for his boss. During the rollover he wants Uwe to sit in the passenger seat ? for the very first time!

programme.title: Made in... - MAN
programme.desc: MAN - Machine-works Augsburg-Nuremberg Incorporated. MAN, for short. The enterprise has existed for more than 250 years and is among the leading European manufacturers of commercial vehicles, engines and machines.

programme.title: Top Ten Show - The Greatest Car Legends
programme.desc: The Greatest Car Legends - Some cars are not just a means of transport, but influenced entire generations and became legends on their own. That’s why we won’t talk about expensive, fast or successful cars on this episode. Instead we show you ten cars that managed to achieve cult status and have numerous fan clubs that are still paying homage to them.

programme.desc: Semi Final GP Germany, Motorsport Arena Oschersleben - NASCAR, America’s most popular racing series, is now well established in Europe and there is no better proof than its European division: the NASCAR Whelen Euro Series. This year, 16 teams from nine different countries with a total of 24 cars prove once again that the NWES with its pure racing character is one of the best touring car series on the old continent. Motorvision.TV shows highlights from every race weekend.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes - Bike Crash
programme.desc: Bike Crash - This time the Stunt Heroes from Action Concept deal with motorbike stunts: high jumps, risky drops and dangerous crashes. As usual, stunt coordinator Domi requires his motorbike specialists Daniel and Marcel to be in top form and highly concentrated. They battle it out in the backyard of action concept. It’s a special crash episode on two wheels!

programme.title: Made in... - Artega
programme.desc: Artega - ARTEGA - the name, which raises the spirits of German automotive lovers. The beautifully designed mid-engine sports car from the East-Westphalian province, is an eye-catcher. The Artega is a rare-looking species.

programme.title: Top Ten Show - The Best Beastly Car Names
programme.desc: The Best Beastly Car Names - When car manufacturers decide to name their cars after animals, they're obviously suggesting that their car reflects certain characteristics of the animals that they're naming the cars after.

programme.title: Fastzone 2025 - Episode 35
programme.desc: Episode 35 - This show brings you the best mix of national and international powersports from around the world.

programme.title: DTM 2025 - Sachsenring, Germany
programme.desc: Sachsenring, Germany - The Deutsche Tourenwagen Masters (DTM) thrills with close GT3 racing, featuring top drivers and teams competing on iconic circuits across Germany and Europe. High-octane motorsport at its finest.

programme.title: Fastzone 2025 - Episode 33
programme.desc: Episode 33 - This show brings you the best mix of national and international powersports from around the world.

programme.title: Gearing Up 2025 - Episode 10
programme.desc: Episode 10 - Gearing Up shows the world's most unique motorsport events covering cars, bikes and everything else

programme.title: Perfect Ride - Bestseller
programme.desc: Bestseller - Today we’re talking about bestsellers: Seat’s best-selling model is celebrating its birthday: the Ibiza turns 40! To mark this milestone, the manufacturer is releasing a special edition. We’ll test it and take a look back at the successes of this compact car. And the big comparison: Mitsubishi ASX goes head-to-head with its sibling models, the Nissan Juke and Renault Captur. Who comes out on top?

programme.title: Special - Pikes Peak
programme.desc: Pikes Peak - For almost a century man and machine have tried to tame the mountain that is Pikes Peak. Daredevils have risked everything to try and be fastest up the 20-kilometer road that summits the rocky mountain at 4300 meters above sea-level. MOTORVISION TV explores the myth of one of the craziest races in the world and takes a look at the 2018 Pikes Peaks.

programme.title: Go Green! - Electric Makeover
programme.desc: Electric Makeover - Electric cars are taking over the world ? but not everywhere. Europe is partly lagging behind this trend, which is why attractive vehicles are in high demand. Kia is launching the EV3, a new compact SUV. Additionally, the EV6 is getting an update. We're testing both in Portugal. And: Europe's cheapest electric car is also getting an upgrade. We reveal five exciting facts about the Dacia Spring.

programme.title: Dream Cars - Italian Coupes
programme.desc: Italian Coupes - Coupes from Ferrari, Lamborghini, Maserati and Alfa Romeo are the embodiment of a sports car, they are breathtaking and irresistible. Created by the most famous designers in the world, every Italian sports car is as beautiful as a piece of art. Whether it is an 8- or 12-cylinder, each engine is more than a machine, each engine is a masterpiece. From Ferrari 488, Ferrari FF to Lamborghini Huracan and Aventador and the Maserati Gran Coupe: DreamCars presents the most fascinating Italian coupes.

programme.title: Car People - Rolls-Royce Show Room
programme.desc: Rolls-Royce Show Room - Welcome, welcome! This is it. One of many, but one of very few in this particular city. It's a dream like car....car? can we even call it a car? It's a Rolls Royce.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes - Highfall
programme.desc: Highfall - While most people never had a car crash, they know spectacular car crashes with huge explosions from movies. But these scenes are much more sensational than in real life, because cars hardly ever explode. The Stunt Heroes reveal how these stunts are prepared and which tricks are needed, when you have to soften a car or jump from a high-rise building.

programme.title: Made in... - Volkner Mobile
programme.desc: Volkner Mobile - With its length of up to 12 meters and its weight of 18 tons, the Performance by Volkner is the most extraordinary luxury motor home from Germany and one of the most exclusive carvans in the world. What makes it so exceptional is the garage between its axes. This system is patented and unique in the field of motor homes. The heads behind this vehicle are Gerhard Volkner and his wife Stephanie.

programme.title: Fastzone 2025 - Episode 33
programme.desc: Episode 33 - This show brings you the best mix of national and international powersports from around the world.

programme.title: DTM 2025 - Nürburgring, Germany
programme.desc: Nürburgring, Germany - The Deutsche Tourenwagen Masters (DTM) thrills with close GT3 racing, featuring top drivers and teams competing on iconic circuits across Germany and Europe. High-octane motorsport at its finest.

programme.title: Belgian Rally Championship 2025 - Omloop van Vlaanderen
programme.desc: Omloop van Vlaanderen - The "BRC" is a belgian rally championship where drivers of modern rally cars compete against each other on gravel and tarmac

programme.title: British Rally Championship 2025 - East Riding Stages Rally, Beverley
programme.desc: East Riding Stages Rally, Beverley - The British Rally Championship brings edge-of-the-seat rally action across the UK, tackling gravel and asphalt stages with plenty of professional drivers vying for glory. Adrenaline-fueled competition at its core.

programme.title: TER Series 2025 - Algola National Rally, South Africa
programme.desc: Algola National Rally, South Africa - The TER World Series typically consists of several rounds held on various tarmac surfaces across Europe. It attracts both professional and amateur rally drivers competing in different classes. The championship provides a platform for drivers and teams to showcase their skills and compete for the title against competitors from around the world.

programme.title: Africa Eco Race 2025 - Stage 8 & 9, Amodjar-Amodjar / Amodjar-Amodjar ''René Metge''
programme.desc: Stage 8 & 9, Amodjar-Amodjar / Amodjar-Amodjar ''René Metge'' - The Africa Eco Race takes adventurers through Africa’s deserts and wilderness, testing endurance and navigation in a grueling rally-raid from Morocco to Dakar. Epic motorsport moments await.

programme.title: UK Rally Show 2024 - Episode 7
programme.desc: Episode 7 - The brand-new UK Rally Show, brought to you by specialist producer Special Stage, is a monthly magazine show bringing you some of the best rally action from around the UK.

programme.title: BTRDA Rallycross 2025 - Round 1, Blyton Park
programme.desc: Round 1, Blyton Park - BTRDA is an UK-based rallycross championship where drivers compete against each other in sprint races

programme.title: Stunt Heroes - Behind the Scene
programme.desc: Behind the Scene - The Stunt Heroes from Action Concept are tough professionals. They jump from houses and make cars fly or explode. On this episode reporter Dean Malay takes a look behind the scenes of the stunt company and lures out the real people behind the Stunt Heroes’ hard shells. Coordinator Domi explains the workflow at Action Concept and reveals why stuntman Tobi is called Heidi.

programme.title: Made in... - PG Bikes
programme.desc: PG Bikes - A plain, industrial building in the Bavarian town of Regensburg. It's the home of the most innovative German bike workshop: PG Bikes. Regensburg develops and produces electric bikes, with retro-appearance.

programme.title: Fastzone 2025 - Episode 34
programme.desc: Episode 34 - This show brings you the best mix of national and international powersports from around the world.

programme.title: Australian Superbike Championship 2024 - Junior, Phillip Island, Victoria
programme.desc: Junior, Phillip Island, Victoria - The "ASBK" is an australian motorcycle championship with up to seven events per season

programme.title: FIM Supermoto World and European Championship 2025 - GP Germany, St Wendel
programme.desc: GP Germany, St Wendel - The 2025 season kicks off on Albaida circuit, Spain. Continuing for the fourth year in a row in Sardegna’s, Tramatza track (Italy) following by S1GP of Germany in St Wendel. From there the action heads to Hungary, new entry of 2025, on Visonta circuit where works will soon begin on the new off-road section and the new sky section. The series shifts to the historic Busca circuit in early September for Grand Prix of Piemonte, then for the first time ever the FIM SuperMoto of Nations will be host in Czech Republic and as is now customary, the Championship ends on October 13th in the famed street circuit of Mettet.

programme.title: FIM Enduro World Championship 2025 - Grand Prix of Wales, Rhayader
programme.desc: Grand Prix of Wales, Rhayader - The FIM EnduroGP World Championship delivers thrilling off-road action, with top riders battling on challenging courses with natural obstacles. A packed schedule showcases skill and excitement.

programme.title: FIM Superenduro World Championship 2024 - Grand Prix of Hungary, Budapest
programme.desc: Grand Prix of Hungary, Budapest - The FIM SuperEnduro World Championship is an international off-road motorcycle racing series that focuses on endurocross-style racing. In SuperEnduro events, riders compete on a closed course that features a combination of obstacles such as rocks, logs, and tight turns, often indoors or in arena settings.

programme.title: FIM Sidecarcross World Championship 2024 - Season Review Documentary
programme.desc: Season Review Documentary - The FIM Sidecarcross World Championship is an international motocross racing series featuring sidecar motorcycles. In this championship, a rider and a passenger (the "passenger" often referred to as the "passenger" or "monkey") work together to navigate challenging off-road tracks. The championship typically consists of multiple rounds held at various locations around the world.

programme.title: FIM World Motocross Championship 2024 - MXGP of Flanders, Lommel
programme.desc: MXGP of Flanders, Lommel - The FIM Motocross World Championship - also known as the MXGP - is the premier championship of motocross racing.

programme.title: FIM X-Trial World Championship 2025 - Grand Prix of France, Chambery
programme.desc: Grand Prix of France, Chambery - The FIM X-Trial World Championship is an international indoor motorcycle trials championship that features some of the best riders in the world competing in highly technical and challenging obstacle courses. In X-Trial events, riders navigate through a series of sections that include obstacles such as rocks, logs, and other challenging terrain, aiming to complete the course with the fewest penalties.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes - The Ambulance
programme.desc: The Ambulance - The Stunt Heroes from Action Concept are always looking for new spectacular stunts and are not running out of options. Stunt coordinator Domi’s latest idea involves an old ambulance, which gets prepared so that the stuntmen can jump right through the ambulance with a car. Find out how this stunt works and how you prepare for this stunt on this episode of Stunt Heroes.

programme.title: Made in... - Brabus
programme.desc: Brabus - In Bottrop, male dreams come true. Those, who look for exclusivity and find the Mercedes AMG performance insufficient in itself, have come to the right place. The Brabus company is the world's leader in car tuning.

programme.title: Top Ten Show - The Most Beautiful Vintage Cars
programme.desc: The Most Beautiful Vintage Cars - Manufacturers are continuously bombarding us with newer and even better models all the time, which claim to be the latest innovation in design. But there are cars that were super-chic 40 years ago and are still celebrated as works of art today. So let’s have a look at ten golden oldies of the car world on this Top Ten Show.

programme.title: Fastzone 2025 - Episode 36
programme.desc: Episode 36 - This show brings you the best mix of national and international powersports from around the world.

programme.title: DTM 2025 - Red Bull Ring, Austria
programme.desc: Red Bull Ring, Austria - The Deutsche Tourenwagen Masters (DTM) thrills with close GT3 racing, featuring top drivers and teams competing on iconic circuits across Germany and Europe. High-octane motorsport at its finest.

programme.title: Australian Boat Racing 2025 - Offshore Round 1 - Wyndham Harbour
programme.desc: Offshore Round 1 - Wyndham Harbour - Australian Circuit Boat Racing offers high-speed thrills on the water, where precision and speed decide intense races on demanding courses. Spectacular competitions captivate motorsport fans across Australia.

programme.title: P1 Offshore Championship 2024 - Sheboygan MidWest Challenge, Lake Michigan
programme.desc: Sheboygan MidWest Challenge, Lake Michigan - The P1 Offshore Powerboat Championship promises tightly fought offshore racing with powerboats reaching top speeds of up to 100 miles per hour. Five events are schedules for this season and Motorvision.TV brings you all the thrilling action from each event!

programme.title: P1 Class 1 Offshore Championship 2024 - Sheboygan, Lake Michigan
programme.desc: Sheboygan, Lake Michigan - The P1 Class 1 Offshore Championship typically features high-performance powerboats competing in offshore races, often in challenging conditions. The championship attracts professional teams and drivers from around the world, and it's known for its thrilling and competitive races.

programme.title: Australian Circuit Boat Racing 2024 - Round 7, Formula GP
programme.desc: Round 7, Formula GP - Australian Circuit Boat Racing is governed by the Australian Power Boat Association (APBA), which oversees a range of powerboat racing events across the country. The season features various types of races including hydroplanes, outboard races, and the prestigious EC Griffith Cup.

programme.title: Australian V8 Superboat Championship 2024 - Season Review
programme.desc: Season Review - The Australian V8 Superboat Championship is considered one of the most spectacular racing series on water, with boats producing up to 2,000 bhp

programme.title: FIA European Truck Racing Series 2025 - Le Mans Bugatti, France
programme.desc: Le Mans Bugatti, France - The FIA European Truck Racing Championship is the biggest, most imposing racing series in the world. The racing trucks are equipped with 1200 hp engines doing up to 100 miles per hour. On a grid with 26 big rigs the 5.5-ton machines doing battle there’s guaranteed action-packed lights-to-flag racing galore.

programme.title: Ferrari Challenge Europe 2025 - Circuit de Barcelona-Catalunya, Montmelo, Spain
programme.desc: Circuit de Barcelona-Catalunya, Montmelo, Spain - The "Ferrari Challenge Europe" is an one-make series for Ferraris with seven races across Europe

programme.title: DTM 2025 - Season Review
programme.desc: Season Review - The Deutsche Tourenwagen Masters (DTM) thrills with close GT3 racing, featuring top drivers and teams competing on iconic circuits across Germany and Europe. High-octane motorsport at its finest.

programme.title: Michelin Le Mans Cup 2025 - Autódromo Internacional do Algarve, Portugal
programme.desc: Autódromo Internacional do Algarve, Portugal - The "Le Mans Cup" is an european multiclass championship for LMP3 & GT-cars and also known as the second devision to the ELMS

programme.title: European Le Mans Series 2025 - Autódromo Internacional do Algarve, Portugal
programme.desc: Autódromo Internacional do Algarve, Portugal - The European Le Mans Series is a multiclass endurance championship with several races across Europe

programme.title: GT World Challenge America 2025 - Indianapolis Motor Speedway
programme.desc: Indianapolis Motor Speedway - GT World Challenge America is the premier North American GT series. Taking place on the best US circuits form Sonoma to Indianapolis, each of the seven race weekends features 90-min double-header races.

programme.title: GT World Challenge Europe 2025 - Misano World Circuit, Italy
programme.desc: Misano World Circuit, Italy - The GT World Challenge Europe is back for another season. The schedule consists of 10 rounds at high-level circuits, split evenly between the Endurance Cup and Sprint Cup. And once again, the calendar features the Total 24 Hours of Spa as the marquee event.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A daring yet reckless pilot who shuns teamwork and the rules of engagement eventually learns the importance of cooperation and discipline. Along the way he has a fiery affair, does some spectacular flying and causes the death of his best friend.

programme.desc: The wanted criminal Richard Bruno Riddick arrives on a planet called Helion Prime and finds himself up against an invading empire called the Necromongers, an army that plans to convert or kill all humans in the universe.

programme.title: Murder On The Orient Express
programme.desc: In December 1935, when his transcontinental luxury train is stranded by deep snow, detective Hercule Poirot is called on to solve a murder that occurred in his car the night before, with a multitude of suspects.

programme.title: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: Two strangers who drunkenly got married in Vegas fight over a huge jackpot after having their annulment denied by a judge.

programme.title: Getting Even With Dad
programme.desc: When he is dropped off at the home of Ray Gleeson (Ted Danson), the father he hasn’t seen in years, Timmy (Macaulay Culkin) hopes that they’ll be able to spend some time together. But, unfortunately, Dad and his two klutzy cohorts are too busy with a get-rich-quick scheme, illegally paving the road to financial bliss...that is, until Timmy steps into their path. Recognizing that only he can set his father straight, this inventive kid puts an end to their plans and makes Ray do time...as a dad!

programme.title: Mehmet
programme.desc: Mehmed series portrays the life of Fatih Sultan Mehmed, one of the most important sultans of the Ottoman Empire. It covers Mehmed's rise to power, the challenges he faced in ascending the throne, conflicts with statesmen, his relationship with his brother Orhan, and finally, the famous conquest of the Byzantine city of Constantinople. Many individuals will shape their lives in his path for Mehmed to fulfill his dream!

programme.title: My Sweet Lie
programme.desc: Abandoned by his wife, Nejat is lying to his daughter not to be upset. But as Kayra grows, these lies become unbearable. Nejat, who is trapped in the corner, meets Suna unexpectedly when he thinks that it is the end of everything. With Suna's entry into their lives, both Nejat and Kayra's world is completely changed. Suna and Nejat find themselves in a sweet game they never expected.

programme.title: The Innocents
programme.desc: In the time following İnci's death, no one had the strength to cope with the difficulties of life. While Memduh and Ege try to support each other and the people in the apartment, Han's complete disregard for his old life after leaving the hospital affects everyone, especially Safiye. An unexpected guest coming to the apartment will change the course of things.

programme.desc: DAILY MASS (LIVE)

programme.title: Billy Goes North - Reptile Rampage
programme.desc: Reptile Rampage - Billy wrestles abandoned crocs, snakes and lizards out of a suburban home, then teams up with trapper Mike to remove some prickly porcupine squatters from a cottage.

programme.title: Billy Goes North - I Smell a Rat Infestation
programme.desc: I Smell a Rat Infestation - Billy comes to the rescue of an unseasoned farmhand whose herd of Ostrich are on the loose. Then Billy and Tim save some house flippers from a red-alert rat infestation.

programme.title: Running Wild with Bear Grylls - Running Wild with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Running Wild with Bear Grylls - World-renowned survivalist Bear Grylls meets actor Ben Stiller (The Secret Life of Walter Mitty (2013)) on the rugged mountains of the Isle of Skye in Northern Scotland, to go on a once in a lifetime adventure. As they explore their surroundings, Bear tests Ben's limits in an effort to see how he measures up to the unpredictable and unforgiving challenges of Mother Nature.

programme.title: Trucking Hell - Season 2 - Highlight 1
programme.desc: Highlight 1 - A 44-ton Artic straddling the central reservation of the M1 is a rush hour headache for Crouch Recovery Incident Manager Steve and one of the youngest Recovery Ops on the team, Pat. Down South, Lantern Recovery op Steve rescues a broken down 26-ton dustcart from a busy London street. Crouch Recovery op Jim gets drenched as he risks life and limb trying to get a broken-down tractor back to its farm ? just a hundred yards away! And Lantern’s night shift recovery op Jason faces a battle to rescue an articulated lorry that’s crashed down a steep ditch off the A1.

programme.title: Search4Hurt - Season 4 - Search4Hurt - Season 4
programme.desc: Search4Hurt - Season 4 - Matt takes the team through a 6 hour obstacle enduro at Raw Challenge on the Gold Coast before the series wrap-up and the announcement of our Most Savage for the season.

programme.title: Andy and Ben Eat Australia - Season 3 - Andy and Ben Eat Australia - Season 3
programme.desc: Andy and Ben Eat Australia - Season 3 - In Kakadu National Park, Andy joins Dewayne Webb foraging pandanus and cooking Seared Buffalo with Pandanus & Charred Herb Salsa over an open fire. He then heads to Darwin, assisting Zach Green at Elijah’s Kitchen, a food truck offering indigenous-inspired meals like Magpie Goose and Crocodile Laksa. Returning to Kakadu, Andy goes fishing with local Barramundi expert Rob Johnson and prepares Paperbark Leaf BBQ Barramundi with Sour Tamarind Sauce at Anbangbang Billabong, showcasing the region's environment and produce.

programme.title: Save this Rhino - Save this Rhino
programme.desc: Save this Rhino - Although the situation is bleak, there is hope. Back at an undisclosed reserve, Matt, KP and Graeme Smith meet another kind of team saving rhinos. From perimeter and ground-based technologies to revolutionary communication and data analysing systems, they are diving into what could be the future of wildlife conservation. Technology seems an obvious solution, but it can’t be the sole strategy, so the team visit a local community who have started a wildlife tourism reserve, which blends employment with the survival of species. It really is a war that is intensifying, and the guys witness the high level of security to protect rhinos against impending incursions at a private game reserve where another baby rhino is roaming freely with his mum. Unfortunately, it’s the exception rather than the rule. Most rhinos struggle to survive. If they survive at all. The clock is ticking, and if these solutions don’t work, they might all be gone by 2025.

programme.title: Get Out Alive with Bear Grylls - Don’t Look Down
programme.desc: Don’t Look Down - The contestants are flown by helicopter to their next journey amidst a torrential downpour where they must cross a rope suspended one hundred feet above a deep gorge. The extreme height, and harsh camping conditions, test the teams.

programme.title: Running Wild with Bear Grylls - Running Wild with Bear Grylls

programme.title: Fishing The Wild - Fishing The Wild
programme.desc: Fishing The Wild - Mike heads to the Highlands of Scotland to catch breakfast trout and dive for scallops to cook a feast on the sea shore.

programme.title: Fishing The Wild - Fishing The Wild
programme.desc: Fishing The Wild - Mike heads to Cornwall to dive for spider crab and free dive for pollack.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT - Season 4 - A Very Buffalo Christmas
programme.desc: A Very Buffalo Christmas - Buffalo flies Christmas toys to isolated northern communities, and holiday stress pushes Kelly past her limit.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT - Season 4 - Crash Landing
programme.desc: Crash Landing - When the Electra’s right landing gear gets stuck in the wheel well, Ray is forced to perform an emergency landing.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners - Duck Camp Dinners 2021
programme.desc: Duck Camp Dinners 2021 - Similar to any good Cajun dish, a successful duck camp requires preparation. The last day on dry land is filled with essential stops to get ready for 5 days on the Bayou. Whether making sure we have the right ingredients for our favorite meals, or getting the boats brushed up and ready for action, the day before can be just as important as the day of.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners - Cajun Grocery Run
programme.desc: Cajun Grocery Run - Tune in as Jean-Paul and the crew share their first day full day at duck camp with a morning in the duck blind and catfish on the jug line. At the end of the day they put their Cajun grocery goods together for an epic duck camp meal.

programme.title: Wild Fed - Black Bear & Wild Rice
programme.desc: Black Bear & Wild Rice - Daniel takes on the profound challenge of a bear hunt with fellow hunter and houndsman Sam. He also explores traditional methods for harvesting delicious wild rice with Arthur, Avani and Sara.

programme.title: Wild Fed - Wild Turkey, Ramps & Fiddleheads
programme.desc: Wild Turkey, Ramps & Fiddleheads - Daniel takes on the challenge of turkey hunting and learns the traditions of foraging fiddleheads and leaks with Avani, Arthur and Sara.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation - Season 2 - Resurfacing in the Everglades
programme.desc: Resurfacing in the Everglades - Facing extinction in recent history, Dan Cabela investigates the conservation model behind the recovery of alligator populations in the heart of Florida.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation - Season 2 - Top of the Food Chain
programme.desc: Top of the Food Chain - Dan Cabela joins conservationists in unraveling the complexity of human wildlife conflict and the reality of living with Africa’s apex predator - the Lion. While the Cabela Family Foundation undertakes the largest ever lion translocation.

programme.title: David Attenborough A Life on Earth - David Attenborough: A Life on Earth
programme.desc: David Attenborough: A Life on Earth - The incredible journey and illustrious career of one of the most travelled men in history, this documentary tells the story of how Sir David Attenborough came to be the voice of modern natural history programs by bringing the natural world into our homes.

programme.title: Yukon for Sale - Joe and Shelley With AJ
programme.desc: Joe and Shelley With AJ - High school sweethearts Joe and Shelly want a log home where they can live off the grid; real estate agent AJ helps them find their dream home.

programme.title: Yukon for Sale - Pam and Richard With Jacklyn
programme.desc: Pam and Richard With Jacklyn - Pregnant aircraft engineer Pam is looking to buy the perfect home; her wish list includes a rural setting and a lot of acres; a home off the grid and away from neighbors.

programme.title: Jet Truck - Jet Truck
programme.desc: Jet Truck - As Chris and Billy psych up for the big challenge race, Billy’s mechanical issues force a hilarious change in plans. And losing the challenge gives the term “Drag Strip” a whole new meaning.

programme.title: Jet Truck - Jet Truck

programme.title: River Hunters - Hadrian’s Wall - Chesters Roman Fort and Carlisle
programme.desc: Hadrian’s Wall - Chesters Roman Fort and Carlisle - This time on River Hunters, presenter and wild swimming loving Rick Edwards - and real life river hunter Beau Ouimette are heading to Britain’s most spectacular and best-preserved Roman frontier - Hadrian’s wall. They will scour the two rivers that flow along its path looking for lost evidence from the might of 2nd century Rome and the invaders’ brutal occupation of Britain.
